{
  "contents": "/**\n * Cloud Sync Module\n * Handles authentication and syncing chat history to cloud server\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport { URL } from 'url';\nimport { Message } from '../types';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../i18n';\nimport * as crypto from 'crypto';\nimport { TelemetryManager, TelemetryEvents } from '../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport interface CloudUser {\n    id: string;\n    username: string;\n    email: string;\n}\n\nexport interface AuthResponse {\n    message: string;\n    token: string;\n    user: CloudUser;\n}\n\nexport interface SyncSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: SyncMessage[];\n}\n\nexport interface SyncMessage {\n    type: string;\n    content: string;\n    thinking?: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    model_name?: string;\n    mode?: string;\n    context?: string;\n    tool_results?: string;\n    tool_uses?: string;\n    images?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface SyncRequest {\n    source: string;\n    sessions: SyncSession[];\n}\n\nexport class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private statusBarItem: vscode.StatusBarItem;\n    private pendingAuth: ((token: string) => void) | null = null;\n\n    private static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'cloudSync.token';\n    private static readonly USER_KEY = 'cloudSync.user';\n    private static readonly STATE_KEY = 'cloudSync.authState';\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://llm-chat-history.com'; // 官方服务器地址\n\n    constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.context = context;\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.statusBarItem = vscode.window.createStatusBarItem(vscode.StatusBarAlignment.Right, 100);\n        this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        this.statusBarItem.show();\n        context.subscriptions.push(this.statusBarItem);\n        \n        // 注册 URI Handler 用于接收浏览器回调\n        context.subscriptions.push(vscode.window.registerUriHandler(this));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle URI callback from browser\n     */\n    async handleUri(uri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Received callback URI:', uri.toString());\n        \n        // 解析查询参数\n        const query = new URLSearchParams(uri.query);\n        const token = query.get('token');\n        const state = query.get('state');\n        const error = query.get('error');\n\n        if (error) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Authentication failed: ${error}`);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 验证 state 防止 CSRF\n        const savedState = this.context.globalState.get<string>(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY);\n        if (state !== savedState) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('Authentication failed: Invalid state');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (token) {\n            // 验证 token 并获取用户信息\n            try {\n                const user = await this.request<{ user: CloudUser }>('GET', '/api/user/profile', undefined, token);\n                await this.storeAuth(token, user.user);\n\n                // 上报登录事件\n                this.trackTelemetryEvent(TelemetryEvents.USER_LOGGED_IN, {\n                    user_id: user.user.id,\n                });\n                \n                // 显示成功提示（更醒目）\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                    `✅ Login successful! Welcome back, ${user.user.username}!`,\n                    'Sync Now',\n                    'View Status'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Sync Now') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    } else if (selection === 'View Status') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.showCloudStatus');\n                    }\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Login failed: ${errorMsg}`);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 清理 state\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, undefined);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get server URL from configuration\n     * Uses official server by default, or custom URL in debug mode\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        \n        if (debugMode) {\n            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n            if (debugUrl) {\n                console.log('[CloudSync] Debug mode enabled, using custom server:', debugUrl);\n                return debugUrl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return CloudSyncManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if cloud sync is enabled\n     */\n    isEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if auto sync is enabled\n     */\n    isAutoSyncEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.autoSync', true);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update status bar based on login state\n     */\n    updateStatusBar(): void {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        if (user) {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = `LLM Chat: $(cloud) ${user.username}`;\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarLoggedIn', { username: user.username });\n            this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        } else {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = 'LLM Chat: $(cloud-offline)';\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarNotLoggedIn');\n            this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get stored token\n     */\n    getToken(): string | undefined {\n        return this.context.globalState.get<string>(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get stored user\n     */\n    getUser(): CloudUser | undefined {\n        return this.context.globalState.get<CloudUser>(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Store auth data\n     */\n    private async storeAuth(token: string, user: CloudUser): Promise<void> {\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, token);\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY, user);\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        // 刷新侧边栏\n        this.refreshSidebarViews();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Clear auth data\n     */\n    async clearAuth(): Promise<void> {\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, undefined);\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY, undefined);\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        // 刷新侧边栏\n        this.refreshSidebarViews();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Refresh sidebar views\n     */\n    private refreshSidebarViews(): void {\n        const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n        const accountProvider = (global as any).__accountStatusProvider;\n        \n        if (automationProvider) {\n            automationProvider.refresh();\n        }\n        if (accountProvider) {\n            accountProvider.refresh();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if user is logged in\n     */\n    isLoggedIn(): boolean {\n        return !!this.getToken() && !!this.getUser();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Make HTTP request\n     * 支持滑动过期：自动检测并更新服务器返回的新 token\n     */\n    private async request<T>(\n        method: string,\n        path: string,\n        body?: any,\n        token?: string\n    ): Promise<T> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n\n        const url = new URL(path, serverUrl);\n        const isHttps = url.protocol === 'https:';\n        const httpModule = isHttps ? https : http;\n\n        const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        };\n\n        if (token) {\n            headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        }\n\n        const requestBody = body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined;\n\n        return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {\n            const req = httpModule.request(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', async () => {\n                        try {\n                            // 检查是否有新 token（滑动过期机制）\n                            const newToken = res.headers['x-new-token'];\n                            if (newToken && typeof newToken === 'string') {\n                                console.log('[CloudSync] Token refreshed by server (sliding expiration)');\n                                // 更新存储的 token\n                                await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, newToken);\n                            }\n\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Login via browser (OAuth flow)\n     */\n    async loginWithBrowser(mode: 'login' | 'register' = 'login'): Promise<void> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        \n        // 生成随机 state 防止 CSRF\n        const state = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, state);\n\n        // 构建回调 URI\n        const callbackUri = vscode.Uri.parse(`${vscode.env.uriScheme}://ClarkZhang.llm-chat-history/auth-callback`);\n        \n        // 构建登录/注册 URL\n        const authUrl = `${serverUrl}/auth/${mode}?state=${state}&redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(callbackUri.toString())}`;\n        \n        console.log('[CloudSync] Opening browser for authentication...');\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Auth URL:', authUrl);\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Callback URI:', callbackUri.toString());\n        \n        // 在浏览器中打开\n        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(authUrl));\n        \n        // 显示等待提示\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            'Please complete the authentication in your browser.',\n            'Cancel'\n        );\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * Logout from cloud\n     */\n    async logout(): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        \n        if (token) {\n            try {\n                await this.request('POST', '/api/auth/logout', undefined, token);\n            } catch (e) {\n                // Ignore logout errors\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 上报登出事件\n        this.trackTelemetryEvent(TelemetryEvents.USER_LOGGED_OUT, {\n            user_id: user?.id,\n        });\n\n        await this.clearAuth();\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(this.t('cloud.logoutSuccess'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Sync sessions to cloud\n     */\n    async syncSessions(source: string, sessions: SyncSession[]): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        if (sessions.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const syncRequest: SyncRequest = {\n            source,\n            sessions,\n        };\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>('POST', '/api/chat/sync', syncRequest, token);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert Message array to SyncMessage array\n     */\n    convertMessages(messages: Message[]): SyncMessage[] {\n        return messages.map((msg) => ({\n            type: msg.type,\n            content: msg.text,\n            thinking: msg.thinking,\n            timestamp: msg.timestamp,\n            model_name: msg.modelName,\n            mode: msg.mode,\n            context: msg.context ? JSON.stringify(msg.context) : undefined,\n            tool_results: msg.toolResults ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolResults) : undefined,\n            tool_uses: msg.toolUses ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolUses) : undefined,\n            images: msg.images ? JSON.stringify(msg.images) : undefined,\n        }));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Validate token with server\n     */\n    async validateToken(showNotification: boolean = false): Promise<boolean> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            await this.request<{ user: CloudUser }>('GET', '/api/user/profile', undefined, token);\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Cloud sync is active and working');\n            }\n            return true;\n        } catch (e) {\n            // Token invalid, clear it\n            await this.clearAuth();\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your login session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        this.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get cloud sync status information\n     */\n    getStatusInfo(): { status: string; message: string; details: string } {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        const isEnabled = this.isEnabled();\n        const isLoggedIn = this.isLoggedIn();\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n\n        if (isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '✅ Active',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: `Cloud sync is enabled and active.\\nServer: ${serverUrl}${debugMode ? ' (Debug Mode)' : ''}\\nAuto sync: ${this.isAutoSyncEnabled() ? 'On' : 'Off'}`\n            };\n        } else if (isLoggedIn && !isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⏸️ Paused',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: 'Cloud sync is disabled. Enable it in settings to start syncing.'\n            };\n        } else if (!isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⚠️ Not Logged In',\n                message: 'Cloud sync enabled but not logged in',\n                details: 'Please login to start syncing your chat history.'\n            };\n        } else {\n            return {\n                status: '⭕ Disabled',\n                message: 'Cloud sync is not enabled',\n                details: 'Enable cloud sync in settings and login to start syncing.'\n            };\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get translator\n     */\n    getTranslator(): Translator {\n        return this.t;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Track telemetry event\n     */\n    private trackTelemetryEvent(eventName: string, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n        try {\n            const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n            if (telemetry) {\n                telemetry.trackEvent(eventName as any, eventData);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Failed to track telemetry event:', error);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n",

Please check logs.',\n            'View Logs'\n        ).then(selection => {\n            if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n            }\n        });\n        // Continue activation but without database functionality\n    }\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 存储启动的监听器\n    const watchers: Array<{ stop: () => void; syncNow: () => void }> = [];\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cursor 监听\n    const cursorDbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath)) {\n        console.log('Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher');\n        const cursorWatcher = new DatabaseWatcher(cursorDbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting, context.extensionPath);\n        cursorWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(cursorWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Cursor database not found:', cursorDbPath);\n    }\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cline 监听\n    const clineStoragePath = getClineStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage found, starting watcher');\n        const clineWatcher = new ClineWatcher(clineStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        clineWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(clineWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage not found');\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Blackbox AI 监听\n    const blackboxStoragePath = getBlackboxStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage found, starting Blackbox AI watcher');\n        const blackboxWatcher = new BlackboxWatcher(blackboxStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        blackboxWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(blackboxWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage not found:', blackboxStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Kilo 监听\n    const kiloStoragePath = getKiloStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath),\n        blackbox_found: fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            // 上报手动保存事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SAVE_TRIGGERED);\n            \n            for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                watcher.syncNow();\n            }\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryAccount', {\n        treeDataProvider: accountStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(automationTreeView, 注册命令：云端登录\n    const cloudLoginCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogin',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                // 已登录，显示选项\n                vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: t('cloud.logout'), action: 'logout' },\n                    { label: 'Sync Now', action: 'sync' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action === 'logout') {\n                        await cloudSync.logout();\n                    } else if (selected?.action === 'sync') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: '$(sign-in) Login', description: 'Login to your existing account', action: 'login' },\n                    { label: '$(person-add) Register', description: 'Create a new account', action: 'register' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: 'Login or register to enable cloud sync'\n                });\n\n                if (choice) {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser(choice.action as 'login' | 'register');\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登出\n    const cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n                // 刷新侧边栏\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：查看云同步状态\n    const showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === 'Login Now') {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                }\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. Enable it now?',\n                    'Enable',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (enable === 'Enable') {\n                    await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n                } else {\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 上报手动同步事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SYNC_TRIGGERED);\n\n            vscode.window.withProgress(\n                {\n                    location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n                    title: t('cloud.syncing'),\n                    cancellable: false,\n                },\n                async () => {\n                    try {\n                        // 触发所有 watcher 同步\n                        for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                            watcher.syncNow();\n                        }\n                        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('cloud.syncSuccess'));\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听任务目录变化\n        const tasksDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'tasks');\n        const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n        \n        \n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(\n            [tasksDir, stateDir],\n            {\n                persistent: true,\n                ignoreInitial: true,\n                depth: 2, // 监听子目录\n                awaitWriteFinish: {\n                    stabilityThreshold: 500,\n                    pollInterval: 100\n                }\n            }\n        );\n        \n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Cline watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'cline');\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n        \n        console.log('Cline watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cline sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 6157,
  "totalLinesInFile": 204
}

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n",

  "totalLinesInFile": 308
}

  "contents": "/**\n * Kilo 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { KiloReader } from './kilo-reader';\nimport { KiloConversationBuilder } from './kilo-conversation-builder';\nimport { KiloMarkdownGenerator } from './kilo-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { KiloWorkspaceFilter } from './kilo-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class KiloWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: KiloWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new KiloWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n        });\n\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new KiloReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                console.log(`[Kilo] 🔍 Checking conversation: ${conversation.id} - ${conversation.title}`);\n\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Workspace filter result: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⏭️ Skipping conversation ${conversation.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                console.log(`[Kilo] ✅ Processing conversation: ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                const builder = new KiloConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Built ${messages.length} messages for conversation ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⚠️ No messages in conversation ${conversation.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new KiloMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'kilo');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[Kilo] Sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n",

}

## 🤖 Assistant #12 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 04:17Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 现在我明白了问题所在！对比这几个 watcher 的实现：
>
> 1. **Cursor (`cursor-database-watcher.ts`)** - **有云端同步功能**：
>    - 有 `cachedSessions` 用于缓存会话数据
>    - 有 `cloudSyncNow()` 和 `performCloudSync()` 方法
>    - 每 60 秒自动执行云端同步
>    - 会将本地缓存的会话数据同步到云端
>
> 2. **Cline (`cline-watcher.ts`)** - **没有云端同步功能**：
>    - 只有本地同步（保存 Markdown 文件）
>    - 没有 `cachedSessions`
>    - 没有 `performCloudSync()` 方法
>
> 3. **Kilo (`kilo-watcher.ts`)** - **没有云端同步功能**：
>    - 只有本地同步（保存 Markdown 文件）
>    - 没有 `cachedSessions`
>    - 没有 `performCloudSync()` 方法
>
> 4. **Blackbox AI (`blackboxai-watcher.ts`)** - **没有云端同步功能**：
>    - 只有本地同步（保存 Markdown 文件）
>    - 没有 `cachedSessions`
>    - 没有 `performCloudSync()` 方法
>
> 所以问题很明显：**只有 Cursor 的 watcher 实现了云端同步功能，而 Cline、Kilo、Blackbox AI 的 watcher 都没有实现云端同步**。
>
> 这需要为这三个 watcher 添加云端同步的支持。
>
> 我将制定一个统一的云端同步策略。每个 watcher 都需要实现标准化的同步机制，确保数据一致性和可靠性。关键是构建一个通用的同步框架，能够灵活适配不同的 AI 服务接口和数据结构。

</details>

找到问题了！通过对比代码，我发现：

## 问题原因

**只有 Cursor 的 watcher 实现了云端同步功能**，而 Cline、Kilo、Blackbox AI 的 watcher 都没有实现云端同步。

对比一下：

### Cursor (`cursor-database-watcher.ts`) - ✅ 有云端同步

```257:306:d:\Projects\llm_chat_history\src\agents\cursor\cursor-database-watcher.ts
    /**
     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端
     */
    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {
        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;
        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();
        // ... 实现云端同步逻辑
    }
```

### Cline / Kilo / Blackbox AI - ❌ 没有云端同步

这些 watcher 只有 `performSync()` 方法，负责本地保存 Markdown 文件，没有 `performCloudSync()` 方法。

---

## 解决方案

需要为 Cline、Kilo、Blackbox AI 三个 watcher 添加云端同步功能。我来帮你实现：

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听任务目录变化\n        const tasksDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'tasks');\n        const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n        \n        \n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(\n            [tasksDir, stateDir],\n            {\n                persistent: true,\n                ignoreInitial: true,\n                depth: 2, // 监听子目录\n                awaitWriteFinish: {\n                    stabilityThreshold: 500,\n                    pollInterval: 100\n                }\n            }\n        );\n        \n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Cline watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'cline');\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n        \n        console.log('Cline watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cline sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}
```

</details>
</details>

}\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听任务目录变化\n        const tasksDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'tasks');\n        const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n        \n        \n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(\n            [tasksDir, stateDir],\n            {\n                persistent: true,\n                ignoreInitial: true,\n                depth: 2, // 监听子目录\n                awaitWriteFinish: {\n                    stabilityThreshold: 500,\n                    pollInterval: 100\n                }\n            }\n        );\n        \n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Cline watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'cline');\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n        \n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n        \n        console.log('[Cline] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cline sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

  "new_string": "    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: task.metadata.task || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: task.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[Cline] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cline',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cline', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[Cline] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Cline] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cline');\n        }\n    }\n}"
}
