  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Cline 文件监听器\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineReader } from './cline-reader';\nimport { ClineConversationBuilder } from './cline-conversation-builder';\nimport { ClineMarkdownGenerator } from './cline-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { ClineWorkspaceFilter } from './cline-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: ClineWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n    \n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new ClineWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听任务目录变化\n        const tasksDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'tasks');\n        const stateDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state');\n        \n        \n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(\n            [tasksDir, stateDir],\n            {\n                persistent: true,\n                ignoreInitial: true,\n                depth: 2, // 监听子目录\n                awaitWriteFinish: {\n                    stabilityThreshold: 500,\n                    pollInterval: 100\n                }\n            }\n        );\n        \n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('Cline file changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Cline watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'cline');\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n        \n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n        \n        console.log('[Cline] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cline' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n        \n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cline] Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cline] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: task.metadata.task || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: task.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[Cline] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cline',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cline', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[Cline] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Cline] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cline');\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"

CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class KiloWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: KiloWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new KiloWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n        });\n\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new KiloReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                console.log(`[Kilo] 🔍 Checking conversation: ${conversation.id} - ${conversation.title}`);\n\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Workspace filter result: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⏭️ Skipping conversation ${conversation.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                console.log(`[Kilo] ✅ Processing conversation: ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                const builder = new KiloConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Built ${messages.length} messages for conversation ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⚠️ No messages in conversation ${conversation.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new KiloMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'kilo');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[Kilo] Sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Kilo 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { KiloReader } from './kilo-reader';\nimport { KiloConversationBuilder } from './kilo-conversation-builder';\nimport { KiloMarkdownGenerator } from './kilo-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { KiloWorkspaceFilter } from './kilo-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class KiloWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: KiloWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new KiloWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n        });\n\n        // 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        // 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000);\n\n        // 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new KiloReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                console.log(`[Kilo] 🔍 Checking conversation: ${conversation.id} - ${conversation.title}`);\n\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Workspace filter result: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⏭️ Skipping conversation ${conversation.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                console.log(`[Kilo] ✅ Processing conversation: ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                const builder = new KiloConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Built ${messages.length} messages for conversation ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⚠️ No messages in conversation ${conversation.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new KiloMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'kilo');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[Kilo] Sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[Kilo] Local sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[Kilo] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'kilo',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('kilo', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'kilo',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'kilo',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'kilo');\n        }\n    }\n}"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Kilo 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { KiloReader } from './kilo-reader';\nimport { KiloConversationBuilder } from './kilo-conversation-builder';\nimport { KiloMarkdownGenerator } from './kilo-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { KiloWorkspaceFilter } from './kilo-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class KiloWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: KiloWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new KiloWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[Kilo] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n        });\n\n        // 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        // 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000);\n\n        // 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('[Kilo] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'kilo' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Kilo] Starting local sync');\n        const reader = new KiloReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Kilo] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                console.log(`[Kilo] 🔍 Checking conversation: ${conversation.id} - ${conversation.title}`);\n\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Workspace filter result: ${belongsToWorkspace}`);\n\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⏭️ Skipping conversation ${conversation.id} - not in current workspace`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                console.log(`[Kilo] ✅ Processing conversation: ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                const builder = new KiloConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Built ${messages.length} messages for conversation ${conversation.id}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log(`[Kilo] ⚠️ No messages in conversation ${conversation.id}, skipping`);\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new KiloMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'kilo');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[Kilo] Local sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'kilo');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[Kilo] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'kilo',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('kilo', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[Kilo] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'kilo',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Kilo] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'kilo',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'kilo');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: BlackboxWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new BlackboxWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Conversations directory not String(error), 'blackboxai');\n        });\n\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Blackbox AI 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { BlackboxReader } from './blackboxai-reader';\nimport { BlackboxConversationBuilder } from './blackboxai-conversation-builder';\nimport { BlackboxMarkdownGenerator } from './blackboxai-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { BlackboxWorkspaceFilter } from './blackboxai-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class BlackboxWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: BlackboxWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new BlackboxWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n        });\n\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Watcher started for:', this.storageDir);\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"

private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new BlackboxWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n        });\n\n        // 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        // 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000);\n\n        // 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastSync = now;\n\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n            }\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "new_string": "    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting local sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Local sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'blackboxai',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('blackboxai', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'blackboxai',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'blackboxai',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'blackboxai');\n        }\n    }\n}"
}

        "diffString": "          }\n      }\n+ \n+     /**\n+      * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n+      */\n+     private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n+         const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n+         const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n+ \n+         if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n+             return;\n+         }\n+ \n+         if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n+             console.log('[BlackboxAI] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n+             return;\n+         }\n+ \n+         // 上报云同步开始事件\n+         trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n+             source: 'blackboxai',\n+             sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n+         });\n+ \n+         try {\n+             // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n+             const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n+                 title: session.title,\n+                 session_id: session.session_id,\n+                 messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n+             }));\n+ \n+             await cloudSync.syncSessions('blackboxai', cloudSessions);\n+             console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n+ \n+             // 上报云同步成功事件\n+             trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n+                 source: 'blackboxai',\n+                 sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n+             });\n+         } catch (error) {\n+             console.error('[BlackboxAI] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n+ \n+             // 上报云同步失败事件\n+             const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n+             trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n+                 source: 'blackboxai',\n+                 error_message: errorMessage,\n+             });\n+             trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'blackboxai');\n+         }\n+     }\n  }\n  ",

  "resultForModel": "The file d:\\Projects\\llm_chat_history\\src\\agents\\blackboxai\\blackboxai-watcher.ts has been updated.",
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Blackbox AI 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { BlackboxReader } from './blackboxai-reader';\nimport { BlackboxConversationBuilder } from './blackboxai-conversation-builder';\nimport { BlackboxMarkdownGenerator } from './blackboxai-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { BlackboxWorkspaceFilter } from './blackboxai-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class BlackboxWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: BlackboxWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new BlackboxWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n        });\n\n        // 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        // 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000);\n\n        // 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting local sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Local sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'blackboxai',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('blackboxai', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'blackboxai',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'blackboxai',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'blackboxai');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

  name: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    lastUpdatedAt?: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 对话引用列表（关键！）\r\n    fullConversationHeadersOnly: Array<{\r\n        bubbleId: string;\r\n        type: number; // 1=用户消息, 2=AI响应\r\n    }>;\r\n    \r\n    // 其他元数据\r\n    text: string;\r\n    richText: string;\r\n    modelConfig: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    unifiedMode: number; // 1=Chat, 2=Agent\r\n    isAgentic: boolean;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 用户消息 Bubble (Type 1)\r\n */\r\nexport interface UserBubble {\r\n    _v: number;\r\n    type: 1;\r\n    bubbleId: string;\r\n    requestId: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户输入内容\r\n    text: string;\r\n    richText: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 上下文信息\r\n    modelInfo?: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    unifiedMode?: number;\r\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\r\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\r\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * AI 响应 Bubble (Type 2)\r\n */\r\nexport interface AIResponseBubble {\r\n    _v: number;\r\n    type: 2;\r\n    bubbleId: string;\r\n    requestId: string;\r\n    createdAt: string;\r\n    capabilityType?: number;\r\n    \r\n    // AI 响应内容\r\n    text: string;\r\n    \r\n    // AI 思考过程（thinking models）\r\n    thinking?: {\r\n        text: string;\r\n        signature: string;\r\n    };\r\n    thinkingStyle?: number;\r\n    \r\n    // 时间信息\r\n    timingInfo?: {\r\n        clientStartTime: number;\r\n        clientRpcSendTime: number;\r\n        clientSettleTime: number;\r\n        clientEndTime: number;\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 模型信息\r\n    modelInfo?: {\r\n        modelName: string;\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 工具调用结果\r\n    toolResults?: Array<{\r\n        name: string;\r\n        result: any;\r\n    }>;\r\n    \r\n    // 工具调用（capabilityType === 15）\r\n    toolFormerData?: ToolFormerData | null;\r\n    \r\n    unifiedMode?: number;\r\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\r\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\r\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Bubble 联合类型\r\n */\r\nexport type Bubble = UserBubble | AIResponseBubble;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 消息结构（用于 Markdown 生成）\r\n */\r\nexport interface Message {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system';\r\n    text: string;\r\n    thinking?: string;\r\n    timestamp: string;\r\n    modelName?: string;\r\n    mode?: string;\r\n    context?: any; // 上下文信息，如文件路径、代码选择等\r\n    toolResults?: Array<{\r\n        name: string;\r\n        result: any;\r\n    }>;\r\n    toolUses?: ToolUseBlock[];\r\n    images?: string[]; // 图片附件\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 数据库行结构\r\n */\r\nexport interface DatabaseRow {\r\n    key: string;\r\n    value: any; // BLOB or TEXT\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Cursor 工具调用原始数据\r\n */\r\nexport interface ## 🤖 Assistant #62 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 04:21Z_

问题在于 `ClineMessage` 和 `Message` 类型有差异。`ClineMessage.toolResults` 是 `ClineToolResult[]` 类型，但 `Message.toolResults` 是 `{ name: string; result: any; }[]` 类型。

我需要在云端同步前将 `ClineMessage` 转换为 `Message` 格式：

---
