{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Cline 对话构建器\r\n * 将 Cline 的 API conversation 转换为统一的消息格式\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n    ClineTask,\r\n    ClineMessage,\r\n    ClineApiMessage,\r\n    ClineApiContent,\r\n    ClineToolUse,\r\n    ClineToolResult,\r\n    ClineToolUseContent,\r\n    ClineToolResultContent\r\n} from './cline-types';\r\nimport { Translator } from '../../i18n';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineConversationBuilder {\r\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Cline Task 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(task: ClineTask): ClineMessage[] {\r\n        const messages: ClineMessage[] = [];\r\n        let messageIndex = 0;\r\n        \r\n        const apiMessages = task.apiConversation.messages || [];\r\n        \r\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\r\n\r\n        for (const apiMsg of apiMessages) {\r\n            const message = this.convertApiMessage(apiMsg, messageIndex, task);\r\n            if (message) {\r\n                // 增强消息内容，添加UI消息中的额外信息\r\n                const enhancedMessage = this.enhanceMessageContent(message, apiMsg, uiMessages[messageIndex]);\r\n                messages.push(enhancedMessage);\r\n                messageIndex++;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 转换单个 API 消息\r\n     */\r\n    private convertApiMessage(\r\n        apiMsg: ClineApiMessage,\r\n        index: number,\r\n        task: ClineTask\r\n    ): ClineMessage | null {\r\n        // 生成消息 ID\r\n        const id = `${task.id}-${index}`;\r\n        \r\n        // 处理简单字符串内容\r\n        if (typeof apiMsg.content === 'string') {\r\n            return {\r\n                id,\r\n                type: apiMsg.role,\r\n                text: apiMsg.content,\r\n                timestamp: this.getTimestamp(index, task)\r\n            };\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 处理复杂内容数组\r\n        if (Array.isArray(apiMsg.content)) {\r\n            return this.convertComplexMessage(\r\n                id,\r\n                apiMsg.role,\r\n                apiMsg.content,\r\n                index,\r\n                task\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return null;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 转换复杂消息（包含多种内容类型）\r\n     */\r\n    private convertComplexMessage(\r\n        id: string,\r\n        role: 'user' | 'assistant',\r\n        content: ClineApiContent,\r\n        index: number,\r\n        task: ClineTask\r\n    ): ClineMessage {\r\n        let text = '';\r\n        const toolUses: ClineToolUse[] = [];\r\n        const toolResults: ClineToolResult[] = [];\r\n        const images: string[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const item of content) {\r\n            switch (item.type) {\r\n                case 'text':\r\n                    text += item.text + '\\n';\r\n                    break;\r\n\r\n                case 'thinking':\r\n                    // cline的推理过程，添加到text中作为思考内容\r\n                    if (item.thinking) {\r\n                        text += `💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}\\n\\n`;\r\n                    }\r\n                    break;\r\n\r\n                case 'image':\r\n                    // 保存图片数据引用（实际可能需要单独处理）\r\n                    images.push(`[Image: ${item.source?.media_type || 'unknown'}]`);\r\n                    break;\r\n\r\n                case 'tool_use':\r\n                    toolUses.push({\r\n                        id: item.id,\r\n                        name: item.name,\r\n                        input: item.input\r\n                    });\r\n                    break;\r\n\r\n                case 'tool_result':\r\n                    toolResults.push({\r\n                        id: `result-${item.tool_use_id}`,\r\n                        toolUseId: item.tool_use_id,\r\n                        content: item.content,\r\n                        isError: item.is_error\r\n                    });\r\n                    break;\r\n\r\n                default:\r\n                    // 处理其他未知类型，尝试提取文本内容\r\n                    if ((item as any).text) {\r\n                        text += (item as any).text + '\\n';\r\n                    }\r\n                    break;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return {\r\n            id,\r\n            type: role,\r\n            text: text.trim(),\r\n            timestamp: this.getTimestamp(index, task),\r\n            toolUses: toolUses.length > 0 ? toolUses : undefined,\r\n            toolResults: toolResults.length > 0 ? toolResults : undefined,\r\n            images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取消息时间戳\r\n     */\r\n    private getTimestamp(index: number, task: ClineTask): string {\r\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 获取精确时间戳\r\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\r\n\r\n        if (uiMessages[index] && uiMessages[index].ts) {\r\n            return new Date(uiMessages[index].ts).toISOString();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 否则使用任务创建时间 + 偏移\r\n        const baseTime = task.metadata.ts || Date.now();\r\n        const offset = index * 1000; // 每条消息间隔 1 秒\r\n        return new Date(baseTime + offset).toISOString();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 增强消息内容处理，支持cline特有的格式\r\n     */\r\n    private enhanceMessageContent(message: ClineMessage, apiMsg: any, uiMsg?: any): ClineMessage {\r\n        // 如果UI消息包含额外信息，添加到消息中\r\n        if (uiMsg) {\r\n            // 添加模型信息\r\n            if (uiMsg.modelInfo) {\r\n                message.text += `\\n\\n🤖 模型: ${uiMsg.modelInfo.modelId}`;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 添加token使用信息\r\n            if (uiMsg.metrics?.tokens) {\r\n                const tokens = uiMsg.metrics.tokens;\r\n                message.text += `\\n📊 Token: 输入 ${tokens.prompt || 0}, 输出 ${tokens.completion || 0}`;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return message;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #110 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:08Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 现在我看到问题了！
>
> Cline 的 `ClineConversationBuilder` 有非常详细的内容处理逻辑：
> 1. 处理 `type: 'text'` → 提取 `item.text`
> 2. 处理 `type: 'thinking'` → 提取思考过程
> 3. 处理 `type: 'image'` → 提取图片
> 4. 处理 `type: 'tool_use'` → 提取工具调用
> 5. 处理 `type: 'tool_result'` → 提取工具结果
> 6. 处理其他类型 → 尝试提取 `item.text`
>
> 但 Kilo 的 `KiloReader.extractTextContent()` 只有简单的处理：```typescript
> private extractTextContent(content: any): string {
>     if (typeof content === 'string') {
>         return content;
>     }
>
>     if (Array.isArray(content)) {
>         return content
>             .filter(item => item.type === 'text')  // 只过滤 text 类型
>             .map(item => item.text)
>             .join('\n');
>     }
>
>     return '';
> }
> ```
>
> 这可能丢失：
> 1. thinking 内容
> 2. 如果 `item.text` 不存在（undefined）也会导致内容为空
> 3. 其他类型的内容
>
> 而且问题更大：`KiloReader` 和 `KiloConversationBuilder` 使用不同的处理逻辑，数据会被分别处理两次：1. `KiloReader.convertMessages()` 使用 `extractTextContent()` 处理内容 → 结果存入 `conversation.messages`
>
>
> 2. `KiloConversationBuilder.buildConversation()` 直接读取 `conversation.messages` 的 `content` 字段
>
> 这种重复处理和不完整的内容提取会导致严重的信息丢失。我需要设计一个更全面的内容提取方法，确保所有类型的内容都能被正确捕获和保留。

</details>

---

## 🤖 Assistant #111 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:09Z_

找到问题了！**Kilo 的 `extractTextContent` 方法过于简单**，没有正确处理 Kilo/Cline 的消息格式。

对比一下：

**Cline（正确处理）**：
- 处理 `type: 'text'` → 提取 `item.text`
- 处理 `type: 'thinking'` → 提取思考过程
- 处理 `type: 'tool_use'` / `type: 'tool_result'`
- 还有默认处理

**Kilo（问题所在）**：
```typescript
private extractTextContent(content: any): string {
    if (typeof content === 'string') {
        return content;
    }
    if (Array.isArray(content)) {
        return content
            .filter(item => item.type === 'text')  // 只过滤 text 类型
            .map(item => item.text)                // item.text 可能不存在！
            .join('\n');
    }
    return '';  // 默认返回空字符串
}
```

让我修复 `kilo-reader.ts`：

---

               title: metadata.title || `Task ${taskId}`,\n                createdAt: metadata.createdAt,\n                updatedAt: metadata.updatedAt,\n                messages: fs.existsSync(this.storageDir) && fs.existsSync(this.tasksDir);\n    }\n\n    private extractMetadataFromUIMessages(uiMessages: any[], apiMessages: any[], taskId: string): any {\n        let title = `Task ${taskId}`;\n        let createdAt = new Date().toISOString();\n        let updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();\n        let model = undefined;\n        let workspaceFolder = undefined;\n\n        if (uiMessages.length > 0) {\n            // 找到第一个用户消息作为标题\n            const firstUserMessage = uiMessages.find(msg =>\n                msg.type === 'say' && msg.say === 'text' && msg.text\n Date(firstUserMessage.ts).toISOString();\n            }\n\n            // 使用最后一条消息的时间戳作为更新时间\n            const lastMessage = uiMessages[uiMessages.length - 1];\n            if (lastMessage && `${modelMessage.selectedModel.provider}-${modelMessage.selectedModel.model}`;\n            }\n\n            // 提取工作区路径\n            workspaceFolder = this.extractWorkspaceFolder(apiMessages);\n        }\n\n        return { title, createdAt, updatedAt, model, workspaceFolder };\n    }\n\n    private extractWorkspaceFolder(apiMessages: any[]): string | undefined {\n        // 从API conversation中查找工作区路径\n        for (const msg of apiMessages) {\n            if (msg.content && Array.isArray(msg.content)) {\n                for (const content of msg.content) {\n item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}\n\nexport function getKiloStoragePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\n\n    let appName = 'Code';\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\n        appName = 'Cursor';\n    }\n\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\n    } else {\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\n    }\n}\n"

> 我发现另一个问题！在第 200 行：```typescript
> const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);
> ```
>
> 这里使用了 `conversation.messages`（来自 reader 的原始 KiloMessage 数组），而不是 `messages`（来自 builder 的 Message 数组）。
>
> 但问题是 `KiloMarkdownGenerator.generate()` 的签名是：
> ```typescript
> generate(conversation: KiloConversation, messages: KiloMessage[]): string
> ```它期望的是 `KiloMessage[]`，而 builder 返回的是 `Message[]`。所以这里使用 `conversation.messages` 是正确的，因为类型匹配。
>
> 但问题是 `conversation.messages` 的内容是空的，因为 `KiloReader.extractTextContent()` 没有正确提取内容。
>
> 我已经修复了 `extractTextContent()` 方法，现在应该能正确提取内容了。
>
> 让我编译测试一下。

</details>

---

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Blackbox AI 数据读取器\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { BlackboxConversation, BlackboxMessage } from './blackboxai-types';\r\n\r\nexport class BlackboxReader {\r\n    private tasksDir: string;\r\n\r\n    constructor(private storageDir: string) {\r\n        this.tasksDir = path.join(storageDir, 'tasks');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    getAllConversations(): BlackboxConversation[] {\r\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] getAllConversations() called');\r\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Looking for tasks in:', this.tasksDir);\r\n\r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(this.tasksDir)) {\r\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Tasks directory not found:', this.tasksDir);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const taskDirs = fs.readdirSync(this.tasksDir);\r\n        console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${taskDirs.length} task directories`);\r\n\r\n        const conversations: BlackboxConversation[] = [];\r\n\r\n        for (const taskDirName of taskDirs) {\r\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Processing task: ${taskDirName}`);\r\n            const task = this.getConversation(taskDirName);\r\n            if (task) {\r\n                conversations.push(task);\r\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Task loaded successfully: ${taskDirName}`);\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.warn(`[BlackboxAI] Failed to load task: ${taskDirName}`);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Total conversations loaded: ${conversations.length}`);\r\n        return conversations.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.updatedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.updatedAt).getTime());\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    getConversation(taskId: string): BlackboxConversation | null {\r\n        const taskDir = path.join(this.tasksDir, taskId);\r\n\r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(taskDir)) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            // 读取 API conversation\r\n            const apiConvPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\r\n            const apiConversation: any[] = fs.existsSync(apiConvPath)\r\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(apiConvPath, 'utf-8'))\r\n                : [];\r\n\r\n            // 读取 UI messages\r\n            const uiMessagesPath = path.join(taskDir, 'ui_messages.json');\r\n            const uiMessages: any[] = fs.existsSync(uiMessagesPath)\r\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(uiMessagesPath, 'utf-8'))\r\n                : [];\r\n\r\n            // 从UI消息中提取元数据\r\n            const metadata = this.extractMetadataFromUIMessages(uiMessages, taskId);\r\n\r\n            // 构建对话对象\r\n            const conversation: BlackboxConversation = {\r\n                id: taskId,\r\n                title: metadata.title || `Task ${taskId}`,\r\n                createdAt: metadata.createdAt,\r\n                updatedAt: metadata.updatedAt,\r\n                messages: this.convertMessages(apiConversation),\r\n                model: metadata.model,\r\n                workspaceFolder: metadata.workspaceFolder\r\n            };\r\n\r\n            return conversation;\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error(`[BlackboxAI] Failed to read conversation ${taskId}:`, error);\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    exists(): boolean {\r\n        return fs.existsSync(this.storageDir) && fs.existsSync(this.tasksDir);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private extractMetadataFromUIMessages(uiMessages: any[], taskId: string): any {\r\n        let title = `Task ${taskId}`;\r\n        let createdAt = new Date().toISOString();\r\n        let updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();\r\n        let model = undefined;\r\n        let workspaceFolder = undefined;\r\n\r\n        if (uiMessages.length > 0) {\r\n            // 找到第一个用户消息作为标题\r\n            const firstUserMessage = uiMessages.find(msg =>\r\n                msg.type === 'say' && msg.say === 'text' && msg.text\r\n            );\r\n            if (firstUserMessage) {\r\n                const text = firstUserMessage.text;\r\n                // 提取第一行作为标题\r\n                const lines = text.split('\\n');\r\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\r\n                    title = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100);\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 使用第一条消息的时间戳\r\n                createdAt = new Date(firstUserMessage.ts).toISOString();\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 使用最后一条消息的时间戳作为更新时间\r\n            const lastMessage = uiMessages[uiMessages.length - 1];\r\n            if (lastMessage && lastMessage.ts) {\r\n                updatedAt = new Date(lastMessage.ts).toISOString();\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 提取模型信息\r\n            const modelMessage = uiMessages.find(msg => msg.selectedModel);\r\n            if (modelMessage && modelMessage.selectedModel) {\r\n                model = `${modelMessage.selectedModel.provider}-${modelMessage.selectedModel.model}`;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 提取工作区路径\r\n            workspaceFolder = this.extractWorkspaceFolder(uiMessages);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return { title, createdAt, updatedAt, model, workspaceFolder };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private extractWorkspaceFolder(uiMessages: any[]): string | undefined {\r\n        // 查找包含工作区路径的消息\r\n        for (const msg of uiMessages) {\r\n            if (msg.type === 'say' && msg.say === 'api_req_started' && msg.text) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    const parsed = JSON.parse(msg.text);\r\n                    if (parsed.request && typeof parsed.request === 'string') {\r\n                        // 在请求文本中查找工作区路径\r\n                        const cwdMatch = parsed.request.match(/Current Working Directory \\(([^)]+)\\)/);\r\n                        if (cwdMatch && cwdMatch[1]) {\r\n                            // 转换路径格式：d:/Projects/fang -> d:\\Projects\\fang\r\n                            return cwdMatch[1].replace(/\\//g, '\\\\');\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                } catch (error) {\r\n                    // 解析失败，继续查找\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        return undefined;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private convertMessages(apiMessages: any[]): BlackboxMessage[] {\r\n        const messages: BlackboxMessage[] = [];\r\n\r\n        for (const msg of apiMessages) {\r\n            if (msg.role && msg.content) {\r\n                const message: BlackboxMessage = {\r\n                    id: `msg_${Date.now()}_${Math.random()}`,\r\n                    role: msg.role,\r\n                    content: this.extractTextContent(msg.content),\r\n                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n                    model: msg.model\r\n                };\r\n                messages.push(message);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\r\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\r\n            return content;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\r\n            return content\r\n                .filter(item => item.type === 'text')\r\n                .map(item => item.text)\r\n                .join('\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getBlackboxStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n",

  "totalLinesInFile": 210
}

_Status: completed_

**Args**

```json
{
  "file_path": "d:\\Projects\\llm_chat_history\\src\\agents\\blackboxai\\blackboxai-reader.ts",
  "old_string": "    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            return content\n                .filter(item => item.type === 'text')\n                .map(item => item.text)\n                .join('\\n');\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}",
  "new_string": "    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\n            return content;\n        }\n\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\n            const parts: string[] = [];\n            \n            for (const item of content) {\n                if (!item) continue;\n                \n                // 处理 text 类型\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（思考过程）\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\n                }\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\n                }\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\n                else if (item.text) {\n                    parts.push(item.text);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\n        }\n\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\n            return content.text;\n        }\n\n        return '';\n    }\n}"
}
```

           else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\r\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\r\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\r\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \r\n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \r\n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\r\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getBlackboxStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}
```

</details>
</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #132 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:10Z_

编译成功！总结一下修复内容：

## 问题原因

**Kilo 和 Blackbox 的 `extractTextContent()` 方法过于简单**，无法正确处理 Cline/Kilo/Blackbox 的消息格式。

这些插件的消息内容是复杂的数组格式：
```json
{
  "role": "assistant",
  "content": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "回复内容..." },
    { "type": "thinking", "thinking": "思考过程..." },
    { "type": "tool_use", "name": "read_file", "input": {...} },
    { "type": "tool_result", "content": "工具执行结果..." }
  ]
}
```

旧代码只处理了 `type === 'text'` 的情况，如果 AI 只用工具调用没有文字回复，内容就是空的。

## 修复内容

更新了 `kilo-reader.ts` 和 `blackboxai-reader.ts` 中的 `extractTextContent()` 方法：

1. ✅ 处理 `type: 'text'` → 提取文本内容
2. ✅ 处理 `type: 'thinking'` → 提取思考过程
3. ✅ 处理 `type: 'tool_use'` → 显示工具调用信息
4. ✅ 处理 `type: 'tool_result'` → 显示工具结果摘要
5. ✅ 处理其他有 `text` 字段的类型
6. ✅ 处理对象类型（可能有 `text` 字段）

## 下一步

需要重新打包插件才能生效：

```bash
npm run package
```

然后重新安装插件即可看到完整的 Kilo/Blackbox 聊天记录内容。

## 🤖 Assistant #141 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:11Z_

现在让我整理这四个产品的存储结构对比：

---

## 📊 Cursor / Cline / Kilo / BlackboxAI 存储结构对比

### 1️⃣ **存储方式**

| 产品 | 存储方式 | 文件位置 |
|------|----------|----------|
| **Cursor** | SQLite 数据库 | `%APPDATA%/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb` |
| **Cline** | JSON 文件 | `%APPDATA%/{Code\|Cursor}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev/tasks/` |
| **Kilo** | JSON 文件 | `%APPDATA%/{Code\|Cursor}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code/tasks/` |
| **BlackboxAI** | JSON 文件 | `%APPDATA%/{Code\|Cursor}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent/tasks/` |

### 2️⃣ **会话容器结构**

| 字段 | Cursor | Cline | Kilo | BlackboxAI |
|------|--------|-------|------|------------|
| **ID** | `composerId` | `id` | `id` | `id` |
| **标题** | `name` | `metadata.task` | `title` | `title` |
| **创建时间** | `createdAt` | `metadata.ts` | `createdAt` | `createdAt` |
| **更新时间** | `lastUpdatedAt` | ❌ | `updatedAt` | `updatedAt` |
| **模型** | `modelConfig.modelName` | ❌ (在消息中) | `model` | `model` |
| **模式** | `unifiedMode` (1=Chat, 2=Agent) | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| **Agent模式** | `isAgentic` | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| **工作区** | `workspaceProjectDir` | `workspaceRoot` | `workspaceFolder` | `workspaceFolder` |

### 3️⃣ **消息结构**

| 字段 | Cursor | Cline | Kilo | BlackboxAI |
|------|--------|-------|------|------------|
| **ID** | `bubbleId` | 生成的 | `id` | `id` |
| **角色** | `type` (1=user, 2=assistant) | `role` | `role` | `role` |
| **内容** | `text` | `content[]` (数组) | `content` | `content` |
| **时间戳** | `createdAt` | `ts` (UI消息) | `timestamp` | `timestamp` |
| **思考过程** | `thinking.text` | `type: 'thinking'` | ❌ | ❌ |
| **模型名称** | `modelInfo.modelName` | ❌ | `model` | `model` |
| **工具调用** | `toolFormerData` | `type: 'tool_use'` | `toolCalls[]` | `toolCalls[]` |
| **工具结果** | `toolResults[]` | `type: 'tool_result'` | `toolResults[]` | `toolResults[]` |
| **图片** | ❌ | `type: 'image'` | ❌ | ❌ |

### 4️⃣ **消息内容格式**

#### **Cursor** - 简单字符串
```typescript
{
  text: "回复内容...",
  thinking: { text: "思考过程...", signature: "..." }
}
```

#### **Cline / Kilo / BlackboxAI** - 复杂数组格式
```typescript
content: [
  { type: 'text', text: '回复内容...' },
  { type: 'thinking', thinking: '思考过程...' },
  { type: 'tool_use', id: '...', name: 'read_file', input: {...} },
  { type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: '...', content: '结果...' },
  { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', data: '...' } }
]
```

### 5️⃣ **工具调用结构**

| 字段 | Cursor | Cline | Kilo | BlackboxAI |
|------|--------|-------|------|------------|
| **调用ID** | `toolCallId` | `id` | `id` | `id` |
| **工具名** | `tool` / `name` | `name` | `name` | `function.name` |
| **参数** | `rawArgs` / `params` | `input` | `arguments` | `function.arguments` (字符串) |
| **状态** | `status` | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| **结果** | `result` | `content` | `content` | `content` |
| **是否错误** | ❌ | `is_error` | `success` (反转) | `success` (反转) |

### 6️⃣ **元数据（Cline 特有）**

Cline 有额外的 Token 统计：

```typescript
{
  tokensIn: number;      // 输入 token 数
  tokensOut: number;     // 输出 token 数
  cacheWrites?: number;  // 缓存写入
  cacheReads?: number;   // 缓存读取
  totalCost: number;     // 总费用
}
```

### 7️⃣ **UI 消息（Cline 特有）**

Cline 有单独的 UI 消息层：

```typescript
{
  ts: number;           // 时间戳
  type: 'ask' | 'say';  // 消息类型
  ask?: 'followup' | 'command' | 'tool' | ...;
  say?: 'task' | 'error' | 'text' | ...;
  text?: string;
  images?: string[];
  tool?: string;
  command?: string;
  path?: string;
  diff?: string;
}
```

---

## 📝 总结

| 特性 | Cursor | Cline | Kilo | BlackboxAI |
|------|:------:|:-----:|:----:|:----------:|
| 存储方式 | SQLite | JSON | JSON | JSON |
| 思考过程 | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| 图片支持 | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Token统计 | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ (部分) | ✅ (部分) |
| 费用统计 | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Agent模式 | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ |
| UI消息层 | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 工作区路径 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

**注意**：Kilo 和 BlackboxAI 都是基于 Cline 的 fork，所以存储结构非常相似，主要区别在于插件 ID 和一些细节字段。

---

## 🤖 Assistant #155 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:30Z_

## 分析结果：❌ 没有传输 Workspace/Project 信息

### 当前传输的字段

**客户端 `SyncSession`：**
```typescript
export interface SyncSession {
    title: string;        // 会话标题
    session_id: string;   // 会话ID
    messages: SyncMessage[];  // 消息列表
}

export interface SyncRequest {
    source: string;       // 来源：cursor/cline/kilo/blackboxai
    sessions: SyncSession[];
}
```

**服务端 `ChatSession`：**
```go
type ChatSession struct {
    ID             string    // 服务端生成的ID
    UserID         string    // 用户ID
    Title          string    // 标题
    Source         string    // 来源
    SessionID      string    // 原始会话ID
    MessageCount   int       // 消息数量
    LocalStartTime *time.Time // 开始时间
    LocalEndTime   *time.Time // 结束时间
    CreatedAt      time.Time
    UpdatedAt      time.Time
}
```

### 缺失的字段

| 字段 | 本地有 | 云端有 |
|------|:------:|:------:|
| `workspaceFolder` / `workspaceProjectDir` | ✅ | ❌ |
| `workspaceRoot` | ✅ | ❌ |

### 问题影响

1. **无法按项目筛选**：用户在云端无法按项目/工作区筛选聊天记录
2. **跨项目混淆**：不同项目的聊天记录混在一起，无法区分
3. **统计困难**：无法统计每个项目的 AI 使用情况

### 建议：添加 workspace 字段

**客户端修改** (`cloud-sync.ts`)：
```typescript
export interface SyncSession {
    title: string;
    session_id: string;
    workspace?: string;      // 新增：工作区路径
    workspace_name?: string; // 新增：工作区名称（更友好）
    messages: SyncMessage[];
}
```

**服务端修改** (`models.go`)：
```go
type ChatSession struct {
    // ... 现有字段 ...
    Workspace     string `json:"workspace,omitempty"`      // 工作区路径
    WorkspaceName string `json:"workspace_name,omitempty"` // 工作区名称
}
```

需要我帮你实现这个功能吗？

Workspace和project在vscode/cursor的概念里，只需要有一个就可以吗？

## 🤖 Assistant #157 (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking, Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:31Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 用户问的是关于 VS Code/Cursor 中 Workspace 和 Project 的概念区别。让我解释一下：
>
> 在 VS Code/Cursor 的概念中：
>
> 1. **Workspace（工作区）**：
>    - 是 VS Code 的核心概念
>    - 可以包含一个或多个文件夹
>    - 单文件夹打开时 = 单个工作区
>    - 多文件夹工作区 = `.code-workspace` 文件
>
> 2. **Project（项目）**：
>    - VS Code 本身没有 "Project" 的概念
>    - 这是其他 IDE（如 IntelliJ、Visual Studio）的概念
>    - 在 VS Code 中，人们通常把 "打开的文件夹" 称为项目
>
> 所以在 VS Code/Cursor 中，**Workspace 是唯一正确的概念**。
>
> 对于我们的场景：
> - 我们需要存储的是用户当前打开的**工作区根目录路径**
> - 这可以通过 `vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders[0].uri.fsPath` 获取
>
> 我应该向用户解释清楚这个概念，并建议只使用 workspace 即可。

</details>

---

## 🤖 Assistant #158 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:31Z_

## VS Code/Cursor 中的概念解析

### 简短回答：**只需要 Workspace 即可**

---

### 概念区别

| 概念 | VS Code/Cursor | 其他 IDE |
|------|----------------|----------|
| **Workspace** | ✅ 核心概念 | 部分支持 |
| **Project** | ❌ 没有这个概念 | ✅ 核心概念（IntelliJ、Visual Studio） |

### VS Code 的 Workspace 类型

```
1. 单文件夹工作区（最常见）
   └── 直接打开一个文件夹
   └── workspaceFolders[0] = 这个文件夹

2. 多文件夹工作区（Multi-root）
   └── 使用 .code-workspace 文件
   └── workspaceFolders = [文件夹1, 文件夹2, ...]

3. 无工作区
   └── 只打开单个文件
   └── workspaceFolders = undefined
```

### 代码中的获取方式

```typescript
// 当前工作区路径
const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;

// 示例值：
// Windows: "D:\\Projects\\my-project"
// macOS/Linux: "/Users/me/projects/my-project"

// 工作区名称（文件夹名）
const workspaceName = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.name;

// 示例值: "my-project"
```

### 建议

对于云端同步，**只需要一个字段**：

```typescript
interface SyncSession {
    // ... 现有字段 ...
    workspace?: string;  // 工作区路径，例如 "D:\\Projects\\my-project"
}
```

或者如果想要更友好的显示：

```typescript
interface SyncSession {
    // ... 现有字段 ...
    workspace_path?: string;  // 完整路径：D:\Projects\my-project
    workspace_name?: string;  // 名称：my-project
}
```

**总结**：VS Code/Cursor 中没有 "Project" 概念，只有 "Workspace"。存储工作区路径就足够了。

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * Cloud Sync Module\n * Handles authentication and syncing chat history to cloud server\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport { URL } from 'url';\nimport { Message } from '../types';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../i18n';\nimport * as crypto from 'crypto';\nimport { TelemetryManager, TelemetryEvents } from '../telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport interface CloudUser {\n    id: string;\n    username: string;\n    email: string;\n}\n\nexport interface AuthResponse {\n    message: string;\n    token: string;\n    user: CloudUser;\n}\n\nexport interface SyncSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;  // 工作区完整路径\n    workspace_name?: string;  // 工作区名称（文件夹名）\n    messages: SyncMessage[];\n}\n\nexport interface SyncMessage {\n    type: string;\n    content: string;\n    thinking?: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    model_name?: string;\n    mode?: string;\n    context?: string;\n    tool_results?: string;\n    tool_uses?: string;\n    images?: string;\n}\n\nexport interface SyncRequest {\n    source: string;\n    sessions: SyncSession[];\n}\n\nexport class CloudSyncManager implements vscode.UriHandler {\n    private context: vscode.ExtensionContext;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private statusBarItem: vscode.StatusBarItem;\n    private pendingAuth: ((token: string) => void) | null = null;\n\n    private static readonly TOKEN_KEY = 'cloudSync.token';\n    private static readonly USER_KEY = 'cloudSync.user';\n    private static readonly STATE_KEY = 'cloudSync.authState';\n    private static readonly OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL = 'https://llm-chat-history.com'; // 官方服务器地址\n\n    constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.context = context;\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.statusBarItem = vscode.window.createStatusBarItem(vscode.StatusBarAlignment.Right, 100);\n        this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        this.statusBarItem.show();\n        context.subscriptions.push(this.statusBarItem);\n        \n        // 注册 URI Handler 用于接收浏览器回调\n        context.subscriptions.push(vscode.window.registerUriHandler(this));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Handle URI callback from browser\n     */\n    async handleUri(uri: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Received callback URI:', uri.toString());\n        \n        // 解析查询参数\n        const query = new URLSearchParams(uri.query);\n        const token = query.get('token');\n        const state = query.get('state');\n        const error = query.get('error');\n\n        if (error) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Authentication failed: ${error}`);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 验证 state 防止 CSRF\n        const savedState = this.context.globalState.get<string>(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY);\n        if (state !== savedState) {\n            vscode.window.showErrorMessage('Authentication failed: Invalid state');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (token) {\n            // 验证 token 并获取用户信息\n            try {\n                const user = await this.request<{ user: CloudUser }>('GET', '/api/user/profile', undefined, token);\n                await this.storeAuth(token, user.user);\n\n                // 上报登录事件\n                this.trackTelemetryEvent(TelemetryEvents.USER_LOGGED_IN, {\n                    user_id: user.user.id,\n                });\n                \n                // 显示成功提示（更醒目）\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                    `✅ Login successful! Welcome back, ${user.user.username}!`,\n                    'Sync Now',\n                    'View Status'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Sync Now') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    } else if (selection === 'View Status') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.showCloudStatus');\n                    }\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Login failed: ${errorMsg}`);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 清理 state\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, undefined);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get server URL from configuration\n     * Uses official server by default, or custom URL in debug mode\n     */\n    private getServerUrl(): string {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        \n        if (debugMode) {\n            const debugUrl = config.get<string>('cloudSync.debugServerUrl', '');\n            if (debugUrl) {\n                console.log('[CloudSync] Debug mode enabled, using custom server:', debugUrl);\n                return debugUrl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return CloudSyncManager.OFFICIAL_SERVER_URL;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if cloud sync is enabled\n     */\n    isEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if auto sync is enabled\n     */\n    isAutoSyncEnabled(): boolean {\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        return config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.autoSync', true);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Update status bar based on login state\n     */\n    updateStatusBar(): void {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        if (user) {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = `LLM Chat: $(cloud) ${user.username}`;\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarLoggedIn', { username: user.username });\n            this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        } else {\n            this.statusBarItem.text = 'LLM Chat: $(cloud-offline)';\n            this.statusBarItem.tooltip = this.t('cloud.statusBarNotLoggedIn');\n            this.statusBarItem.command = 'chatHistory.cloudLogin';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get stored token\n     */\n    getToken(): string | undefined {\n        return this.context.globalState.get<string>(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get stored user\n     */\n    getUser(): CloudUser | undefined {\n        return this.context.globalState.get<CloudUser>(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Store auth data\n     */\n    private async storeAuth(token: string, user: CloudUser): Promise<void> {\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, token);\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY, user);\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        // 刷新侧边栏\n        this.refreshSidebarViews();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Clear auth data\n     */\n    async clearAuth(): Promise<void> {\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, undefined);\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.USER_KEY, undefined);\n        this.updateStatusBar();\n        // 刷新侧边栏\n        this.refreshSidebarViews();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Refresh sidebar views\n     */\n    private refreshSidebarViews(): void {\n        const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n        const accountProvider = (global as any).__accountStatusProvider;\n        \n        if (automationProvider) {\n            automationProvider.refresh();\n        }\n        if (accountProvider) {\n            accountProvider.refresh();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Check if user is logged in\n     */\n    isLoggedIn(): boolean {\n        return !!this.getToken() && !!this.getUser();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Make HTTP request\n     * 支持滑动过期：自动检测并更新服务器返回的新 token\n     */\n    private async request<T>(\n        method: string,\n        path: string,\n        body?: any,\n        token?: string\n    ): Promise<T> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n\n        const url = new URL(path, serverUrl);\n        const isHttps = url.protocol === 'https:';\n        const httpModule = isHttps ? https : http;\n\n        const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n        };\n\n        if (token) {\n            headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        }\n\n        const requestBody = body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined;\n\n        return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {\n            const req = httpModule.request(\n                {\n                    hostname: url.hostname,\n                    port: url.port || (isHttps ? 443 : 80),\n                    path: url.pathname + url.search,\n                    method,\n                    headers,\n                },\n                (res) => {\n                    let data = '';\n                    res.on('data', (chunk) => (data += chunk));\n                    res.on('end', async () => {\n                        try {\n                            // 检查是否有新 token（滑动过期机制）\n                            const newToken = res.headers['x-new-token'];\n                            if (newToken && typeof newToken === 'string') {\n                                console.log('[CloudSync] Token refreshed by server (sliding expiration)');\n                                // 更新存储的 token\n                                await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.TOKEN_KEY, newToken);\n                            }\n\n                            const json = JSON.parse(data);\n                            if (res.statusCode && res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n                                resolve(json as T);\n                            } else {\n                                reject(new Error(json.error || `Request failed with status ${res.statusCode}`));\n                            }\n                        } catch (e) {\n                            reject(new Error('Failed to parse response'));\n                        }\n                    });\n                }\n            );\n\n            req.on('error', reject);\n\n            if (requestBody) {\n                req.write(requestBody);\n            }\n            req.end();\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Login via browser (OAuth flow)\n     */\n    async loginWithBrowser(mode: 'login' | 'register' = 'login'): Promise<void> {\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n        \n        // 生成随机 state 防止 CSRF\n        const state = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n        await this.context.globalState.update(CloudSyncManager.STATE_KEY, state);\n\n        // 构建回调 URI\n        const callbackUri = vscode.Uri.parse(`${vscode.env.uriScheme}://ClarkZhang.llm-chat-history/auth-callback`);\n        \n        // 构建登录/注册 URL\n        const authUrl = `${serverUrl}/auth/${mode}?state=${state}&redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(callbackUri.toString())}`;\n        \n        console.log('[CloudSync] Opening browser for authentication...');\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Auth URL:', authUrl);\n        console.log('[CloudSync] Callback URI:', callbackUri.toString());\n        \n        // 在浏览器中打开\n        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(authUrl));\n        \n        // 显示等待提示\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n            'Please complete the authentication in your browser.',\n            'Cancel'\n        );\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * Logout from cloud\n     */\n    async logout(): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        \n        if (token) {\n            try {\n                await this.request('POST', '/api/auth/logout', undefined, token);\n            } catch (e) {\n                // Ignore logout errors\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 上报登出事件\n        this.trackTelemetryEvent(TelemetryEvents.USER_LOGGED_OUT, {\n            user_id: user?.id,\n        });\n\n        await this.clearAuth();\n        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(this.t('cloud.logoutSuccess'));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Sync sessions to cloud\n     */\n    async syncSessions(source: string, sessions: SyncSession[]): Promise<void> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            throw new Error('Not logged in');\n        }\n\n        if (sessions.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const syncRequest: SyncRequest = {\n            source,\n            sessions,\n        };\n\n        await this.request<{ message: string }>('POST', '/api/chat/sync', syncRequest, token);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert Message array to SyncMessage array\n     */\n    convertMessages(messages: Message[]): SyncMessage[] {\n        return messages.map((msg) => ({\n            type: msg.type,\n            content: msg.text,\n            thinking: msg.thinking,\n            timestamp: msg.timestamp,\n            model_name: msg.modelName,\n            mode: msg.mode,\n            context: msg.context ? JSON.stringify(msg.context) : undefined,\n            tool_results: msg.toolResults ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolResults) : undefined,\n            tool_uses: msg.toolUses ? JSON.stringify(msg.toolUses) : undefined,\n            images: msg.images ? JSON.stringify(msg.images) : undefined,\n        }));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Validate token with server\n     */\n    async validateToken(showNotification: boolean = false): Promise<boolean> {\n        const token = this.getToken();\n        if (!token) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            await this.request<{ user: CloudUser }>('GET', '/api/user/profile', undefined, token);\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showInformationMessage('✅ Cloud sync is active and working');\n            }\n            return true;\n        } catch (e) {\n            // Token invalid, clear it\n            await this.clearAuth();\n            if (showNotification) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your login session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        this.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get cloud sync status information\n     */\n    getStatusInfo(): { status: string; message: string; details: string } {\n        const user = this.getUser();\n        const isEnabled = this.isEnabled();\n        const isLoggedIn = this.isLoggedIn();\n        const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n        const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n        const serverUrl = this.getServerUrl();\n\n        if (isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '✅ Active',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: `Cloud sync is enabled and active.\\nServer: ${serverUrl}${debugMode ? ' (Debug Mode)' : ''}\\nAuto sync: ${this.isAutoSyncEnabled() ? 'On' : 'Off'}`\n            };\n        } else if (isLoggedIn && !isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⏸️ Paused',\n                message: `Logged in as ${user?.username}`,\n                details: 'Cloud sync is disabled. Enable it in settings to start syncing.'\n            };\n        } else if (!isLoggedIn && isEnabled) {\n            return {\n                status: '⚠️ Not Logged In',\n                message: 'Cloud sync enabled but not logged in',\n                details: 'Please login to start syncing your chat history.'\n            };\n        } else {\n            return {\n                status: '⭕ Disabled',\n                message: 'Cloud sync is not enabled',\n                details: 'Enable cloud sync in settings and login to start syncing.'\n            };\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Get translator\n     */\n    getTranslator(): Translator {\n        return this.t;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Track telemetry event\n     */\n    private trackTelemetryEvent(eventName: string, eventData?: Record<string, any>): void {\n        try {\n            const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n            if (telemetry) {\n                telemetry.trackEvent(eventName as any, eventData);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Failed to track telemetry event:', error);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}
```

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

    console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            //             error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cline'    }\n        \n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n        \n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cline] Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cline] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                // 转换 ClineMessage 为 Message 格式\n                const convertedMessages: Message[] = messages.map(msg => ({\n                    id: msg.id,\n                    type: msg.type,\n                    text: msg.text,\n                    timestamp: msg.timestamp,\n                    thinking: msg.thinking,\n                    toolUses: msg.toolUses?.map(tu => ({\n                        name: tu.name,\n                        markdown: JSON.stringify(tu.input),\n                    })),\n                    toolResults: msg.toolResults?.map(tr => ({\n                        name: tr.toolUseId,\n                        result: tr.content,\n                    })),\n                    images: msg.images,\n                }));\n\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: task.metadata.task || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: task.id,\n                    messages: convertedMessages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Error during Cline sync:', error);\n            console.error('[DEBUG] Stack trace:', (error as Error).stack);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'cline');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[Cline] No sessions to sync to cloud');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cline',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cline', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[Cline] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[Cline] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cline',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cline');\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"
}
