message.Thinking,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage.Timestamp, message.ModelName, message.Mode, message.Context,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage.ToolResults, message.ToolUses, message.Images, message.CreatedAt, message.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// 计算 local_start_time 和 local_end_time\n\t\t\t\tvar localStartTime, localEndTime *time.Time\n\t\t\t\tif len(sessionReq.Messages) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tstartTime := sessionReq.Messages[0].Timestamp\n\t\t\t\t\tendTime := sessionReq.Messages[len(sessionReq.Messages)-1].Timestamp\n\t\t\t\t\tlocalStartTime = &startTime\n\t\t\t\t\tlocalEndTime = &endTime\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// 更新会话的消息数量、时间、workspace 和更新时间\n\t\t\t\t_, err = database.DB.Exec(`\n\t\t\t\t\tUPDATE chat_sessions SET \n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage_count = $1, \n\t\t\t\t\t\ttitle = $2, \n\t\t\t\t\t\tlocal_start_time = $3, \n\t\t\t\t\t\tlocal_end_time = $4,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspace_path = COALESCE(NULLIF($5, ''), workspace_path),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspace_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($6, ''), workspace_name),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tupdated_at = NOW() \n\t\t\t\t\tWHERE id = $7`,\n\t\t\t\t\tnewMsgCount, sessionReq.Title, localStartTime, localEndTime, \n\t\t\t\t\tsessionReq.WorkspacePath, sessionReq.WorkspaceName, existingID)\n\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// 即使没有新消息，也更新标题和 workspace（如果有变化）\n\t\t\t\t// 使用 COALESCE + NULLIF 确保只在提供了非空值时才更新\n\t\t\t\t_, _ = database.DB.Exec(`\n\t\t\t\t\tUPDATE chat_sessions SET \n\t\t\t\t\t\ttitle = COALESCE(NULLIF($1, ''), title),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspace_path = COALESCE(NULLIF($2, ''), workspace_path),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspace_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($3, ''), workspace_name),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tupdated_at = NOW() \n\t\t\t\t\tWHERE id = $4`,\n\t\t\t\t\tsessionReq.Title, sessionReq.WorkspacePath, sessionReq.WorkspaceName, existingID)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 更新同步状态\n\t_, err = database.DB.Exec(`\n\t\tUPDATE sync_requests SET status = $1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2`,\n\t\t\"completed\", syncReq.ID)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{\"error\": \"Failed to update sync status\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tc.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{\"message\": \"Chat history synced successfully\"})\n}\n\n// SearchResult 搜索结果\ntype SearchResult struct {\n\tSessionID    string `json:\"session_id\"`\n\tSessionTitle string `json:\"session_title\"`\n\tSource       string `json:\"source\"`\n\tMessageID    string `json:\"message_id,omitempty\"`\n\tMessageType  string `json:\"message_type,omitempty\"`\n\tContent      string `json:\"content\"`\n\tHighlight    string `json:\"highlight\"`\n\tTimestamp    string `json:\"timestamp\"`\n\tMatchType    string `json:\"match_type\"` // title, content, thinking\n}\n\n// SearchChatHistory 搜索聊天历史\nfunc SearchChatHistory(c *gin.Context) {\n\tuserID := c.GetString(\"user_id\")\n\tquery := c.Query(\"q\")\n\tsearchType := c.DefaultQuery(\"type\", \"all\") // all, title, content\n\tsource := c.Query(\"source\")\n\tlimitStr := c.DefaultQuery(\"limit\", \"50\")\n\n\tif query == \"\" {\n\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{\"error\": \"Search query is required\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tlimit, _ := strconv.Atoi(limitStr)\n\tif limit <= 0 || limit > 100 {\n\t\tlimit = 50\n\t}\n\n\t// 准备搜索词 - 支持空格分隔的多个关键词\n\t// 使用 simple 配置和 ILIKE 结合，更好地支持中文\n\tsearchTerms := \"%\" + query + \"%\"\n\n\tvar results []SearchResult\n\n\t// 根据搜索类型执行不同的查询\n\tif searchType == \"all\" || searchType == \"title\" {\n\t\t// 搜索会话标题\n\t\ttitleQuery := `\n\t\t\tSELECT DISTINCT cs.id, cs.title, cs.source, cs.created_at\n\t\t\tFROM chat_sessions cs\n\t\t\tWHERE cs.user_id = $1 \n\t\t\t  AND cs.title ILIKE $2`\n\t\t\n\t\targs := []interface{}{userID, searchTerms}\n\t\targIndex := 3\n\n\t\tif source != \"\" {\n\t\t\ttitleQuery += ` AND cs.source = $` + strconv.Itoa(argIndex)\n\t\t\targs = append(args, source)\n\t\t\targIndex++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttitleQuery += ` ORDER BY cs.created_at DESC LIMIT $` + strconv.Itoa(argIndex)\n\t\targs = append(args, limit)\n\n\t\trows, err := database.DB.Query(titleQuery, args...)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tdefer rows.Close()\n\t\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\t\t\tvar sessionID, title, src string\n\t\t\t\tvar createdAt time.Time\n\t\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&sessionID, &title, &src, &createdAt); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t// 生成高亮片段\n\t\t\t\t\thighlight := highlightText(title, query, 100)\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, SearchResult{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSessionID:    sessionID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSessionTitle: title,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:       src,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tContent:      title,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tHighlight:    highlight,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp:    createdAt.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:    \"title\",\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif searchType == \"all\" || searchType == \"content\" {\n\t\t// 搜索消息内容和思考过程\n\t\tcontentQuery := `\n\t\t\tSELECT cm.id, cm.session_id, cm.type, cm.content, cm.thinking, cm.timestamp,\n\t\t\t       cs.title, cs.source\n\t\t\tFROM chat_messages cm\n\t\t\tJOIN chat_sessions cs ON cm.session_id = cs.id\n\t\t\tWHERE cs.user_id = $1 \n\t\t\t  AND (cm.content ILIKE $2 OR cm.thinking ILIKE $2)`\n\n\t\targs := []interface{}{userID, searchTerms}\n\t\targIndex := 3\n\n\t\tif source != \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontentQuery += ` AND cs.source = $` + strconv.Itoa(argIndex)\n\t\t\targs = append(args, source)\n\t\t\targIndex++\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tcontentQuery += ` ORDER BY cm.timestamp DESC LIMIT $` + strconv.Itoa(argIndex)\n\t\targs = append(args, limit)\n\n\t\trows, err := database.DB.Query(contentQuery, args...)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tdefer rows.Close()\n\t\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\t\t\tvar msgID, sessionID, msgType, sessionTitle, src string\n\t\t\t\tvar content, thinking sql.NullString\n\t\t\t\tvar timestamp time.Time\n\n\t\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&msgID, &sessionID, &msgType, &content, &thinking, &timestamp, &sessionTitle, &src); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t// 确定匹配类型和内容\n\t\t\t\t\tmatchType := \"content\"\n\t\t\t\t\tmatchContent := \"\"\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\tif content.Valid && containsIgnoreCase(content.String, query) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmatchContent = content.String\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmatchType = \"content\"\n\t\t\t\t\t} else if thinking.Valid && containsIgnoreCase(thinking.String, query) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmatchContent = thinking.String\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmatchType = \"thinking\"\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif matchContent != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\thighlight := highlightText(matchContent, query, 150)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, SearchResult{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSessionID:    sessionID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSessionTitle: sessionTitle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:       src,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMessageID:    msgID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMessageType:  msgType,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tContent:      truncateText(matchContent, 200),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tHighlight:    highlight,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTimestamp:    timestamp.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:    matchType,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 去重（按 session + message 组合）\n\tseen := make(map[string]bool)\n\tuniqueResults := make([]SearchResult, 0)\n\tfor _, r := range results {\n\t\tkey := r.SessionID + \"-\" + r.MessageID + \"-\" + r.MatchType\n\t\tif !seen[key] {\n\t\t\tseen[key] = true\n\t\t\tuniqueResults = append(uniqueResults, r)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 限制结果数量\n\tif len(uniqueResults) > limit {\n\t\tuniqueResults = uniqueResults[:limit]\n\t}\n\n\tc.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{\n\t\t\"results\": uniqueResults,\n\t\t\"total\":   len(uniqueResults),\n\t\t\"query\":   query,\n\t})\n}\n\n// containsIgnoreCase 检查字符串是否包含子串（忽略大小写）\nfunc containsIgnoreCase(s, substr string) bool {\n\treturn strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(s), strings.ToLower(substr))\n}\n\n// highlightText 生成带高亮的文本片段\nfunc highlightText(text, query string, maxLen int) string {\n\tlowerText := strings.ToLower(text)\n\tlowerQuery := strings.ToLower(query)\n\t\n\t// 找到匹配位置\n\tidx := strings.Index(lowerText, lowerQuery)\n\tif idx == -1 {\n\t\t// 没找到，返回截断的文本\n\t\tif len(text) > maxLen {\n\t\t\treturn text[:maxLen] + \"...\"\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn text\n\t}\n\n\t// 计算片段范围，让匹配词在中间\n\tstart := idx - maxLen/3\n\tif start < 0 {\n\t\tstart = 0\n\t}\n\tend := start + maxLen\n\tif end > len(text) {\n\t\tend = len(text)\n\t\tstart = end - maxLen\n\t\tif start < 0 {\n\t\t\tstart = 0\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// 提取片段\n\tsnippet := text[start:end]\n\t\n\t// 添加省略号\n\tprefix := \"\"\n\tsuffix := \"\"\n\tif start > 0 {\n\t\tprefix = \"...\"\n\t}\n\tif end < len(text) {\n\t\tsuffix = \"...\"\n\t}\n\n\t// 高亮匹配的文本（用 <mark> 标签）\n\thighlighted := highlightMatches(snippet, query)\n\t\n\treturn prefix + highlighted + suffix\n}\n\n// highlightMatches 在文本中高亮所有匹配项\nfunc highlightMatches(text, query string) string {\n\tif query == \"\" {\n\t\treturn text\n\t}\n\t\n\tlowerText := strings.ToLower(text)\n\tlowerQuery := strings.ToLower(query)\n\t\n\tvar result strings.Builder\n\tlastEnd := 0\n\t\n\tfor {\n\t\tidx := strings.Index(lowerText[lastEnd:], lowerQuery)\n\t\tif idx == -1 {\n\t\t\tresult.WriteString(text[lastEnd:])\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\t\n\t\tmatchStart := lastEnd + idx\n\t\tmatchEnd := matchStart + len(query)\n\t\t\n\t\tresult.WriteString(text[lastEnd:matchStart])\n\t\tresult.WriteString(\"<mark>\")\n\t\tresult.WriteString(text[matchStart:matchEnd])\n\t\tresult.WriteString(\"</mark>\")\n\t\t\n\t\tlastEnd = matchEnd\n\t}\n\t\n\treturn result.String()\n}\n\n// truncateText 截断文本\nfunc truncateText(text string, maxLen int) string {\n\tif len(text) <= maxLen {\n\t\treturn text\n\t}\n\treturn text[:maxLen] + \"...\"\n}\n\n// DeleteChatSession 删除聊天会话\nfunc DeleteChatSession(c *gin.Context) {\n\tuserID := c.GetString(\"user_id\")\n\tsessionID := c.Param(\"id\")\n\n\t// 检查会话是否存在且属于当前用户\n\tvar sessionIDCheck string\n\terr := database.DB.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT id FROM chat_sessions WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2`,\n\t\tsessionID, userID).Scan(&sessionIDCheck)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif err == sql.ErrNoRows {\n\t\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{\"error\": \"Session not found\"})\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{\"error\": \"Database error\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 删除消息\n\t_, err = database.DB.Exec(`DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE session_id = $1`, sessionID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{\"error\": \"Failed to delete messages\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 删除会话\n\t_, err = database.DB.Exec(`DELETE FROM chat_sessions WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2`, sessionID, userID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tc.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{\"error\": \"Failed to delete session\"})\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tc.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{\"message\": \"Session deleted successfully\"})\n}\n"
```json
}
```

</details>
</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #273 (Agent)

_2025-12-26 05:41Z_

编译成功！

## 问题原因

数据库中旧数据的 `workspace_path` 和 `workspace_name` 是 `NULL`，而 Go 的 `string` 类型无法直接接收 `NULL` 值，会导致 `Scan` 失败。

## 解决方案

在 SQL 查询中使用 `COALESCE(column, '')` 将 NULL 转换为空字符串：

```sql
SELECT ..., COALESCE(workspace_path, ''), COALESCE(workspace_name, ''), ...
```

## 下一步

重启后端服务即可：

```bash
./llm-chat-history-backend.exe
```

totalPages = 1;\nlet currentSessionId = null;\nlet allMessages = [];\nlet groupedNodes = [];\nlet currentNodeIndex = -1;\nlet expandMode = 'click';\nlet allExpanded = false;\nlet showUserOnly = false;\nlet selectedUserNodeIndex = -1;\nlet currentTheme = 'light';\n\n// ========== 主题控制 ==========\nfunction toggleTheme() {\n    const newTheme = currentTheme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';\n    setTheme(newTheme);\n    setCookie('theme', newTheme);\n}\n\nfunction setTheme(theme) {\n    currentTheme = theme;\n    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);\n    \n    const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');\n    const label = document.getElementById('themeLabel');\n    if (icon) {\n        icon.className = theme === 'light' ? 'fas fa-moon' : 'fas fa-sun';\n    }\n    if (label) {\n        label.textContent = theme === 'light' ? 'Dark' : 'Light';\n    }\n}\n\n// ========== 键盘导航 ==========\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n    if (!currentSessionId) return;\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' && currentNodeIndex > 0) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex - 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' && currentNodeIndex < groupedNodes.length - 1) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex + 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n        document.getElementById('mainLayout').classList.remove('has-selection');\n        currentSessionId = null;\n    }\n});\n\n// ========== 初始化 ==========\nfunction init() {\n    // 加载主题\n    const savedTheme = getCookie('theme') || 'light';\n    setTheme(savedTheme);\n    \n    // 加载展开模式\n    const savedMode = getCookie('expandMode');\n    if (savedMode === 'click' || savedMode === 'hover') {\n        expandMode = savedMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // 加载会话并自动选中最新的\n    loadSessions(1, true);\n    \n    // 搜索框事件\n    document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', debounce(filterSessions, 300));\n}\n\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n</script>\n{{end}}\n",

});\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 环境信息\r\n    if (parsed.environment) {\r\n        html += `\r\n            <div class=\"item-card\">\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-header collapsed\" class=\"fas fa-chevron-down item-card-toggle\"></i>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-body collapsed\">\r\n                    <div class=\"env-details\">${formatEnvironmentDetails(parsed.environment)}</div>\r\n                </div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 如果什么都没解析到，显示原始内容\r\n    if (!parsed.task && parsed.toolResults.length === 0 && !parsed.environment) {\r\n        html = `\r\n            <div class=\"item-card\">\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-header\">\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-icon message\">💬</div>\r\n                    <div class=\"item-card-title\">\r\n                        <div class=\"title-main\">User Message</div>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div class=\"item-card-body\">\r\n                    <div class=\"content-text\">${formatContent(msg.content)}</div>\r\n                </div>\r\n            </div>\r\n        `;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    return html;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ========== 环境详情格式化 ==========\r\nfunction formatEnvironmentDetails(envText) {\r\n    if (!envText) return '';\r\n    \r\n    // 解析环境详情中的各个部分\r\n    const sections = [];\r\n    const lines = envText.split('\\n');\r\n    let currentSection = null;\r\n    let currentContent = [];\r\n    \r\n    lines.forEach(line => {\r\n        if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\r\n            if (currentSection) {\r\n                sections.push({ title: currentSection, content: currentContent.join('\\n') class=\"env-section-title\">${escapeHtml(s.title)}</div>\r\n            <div class=\"env-section-content\">${escapeHtml(s.content.trim())}</div>\r\n        </div>\r\n    `).join('');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// header.closest('.item-card').dataset.index === '0';\r\n        if (allExpanded) {\r\n            header.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n            body.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n        } class=\"view-mode-toggle\">\n                        <button class=\"view-mode-btn active\" data-view=\"formatted\" onclick=\"setViewMode('formatted')\" title=\"Formatted View\">\n                            <i class=\"fas fa-layer-group\"></i>\n                        </button>\n                        <button class=\"view-mode-btn\" data-view=\"raw\" onclick=\"setViewMode('raw')\" title=\"Raw JSON\">\n                            <i class=\"fas fa-code\"></i>\n                        </button>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"expand-mode-toggle\" id=\"expandModeToggle\">\n                        <button class=\"mode-btn active\" data-mode=\"click\" onclick=\"setExpandMode('click')\">Click</button>\n                        <button class=\"mode-btn\" data-mode=\"hover\" onclick=\"setExpandMode('hover')\">Hover</button>\n                    </div>\n                    <button class=\"expand-all-btn\" id=\"expandAllBtn\" onclick=\"toggleExpandAll()\" style=\"display: none;\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-expand-alt\"></i> All\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-summary\" id=\"detailSummary\"></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"detail-body\" id=\"detailBody\">\n            <div class=\"empty-state\">\n                <i class=\"fas fa-hand-pointer\"></i>\n                <p>Select a message from timeline</p>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- 引入拆分后的 JS -->\n<script src=\"/static/js/utils.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/sessions.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/timeline.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/detail.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/components/tool-diff.js\"></script>\n\n<script>\n// ========== 全局状态 ==========\nlet sessions = [];\nlet currentPage = 1;\nlet totalPages = 1;\nlet currentSessionId = null;\nlet allMessages = [];\nlet groupedNodes = [];\nlet currentNodeIndex = -1;\nlet expandMode = 'click';\nlet allExpanded = false;\nlet showUserOnly = false;\nlet selectedUserNodeIndex = -1;\nlet currentTheme = 'light';\n\n// ========== 主题控制 ==========\nfunction toggleTheme() {\n    const newTheme = currentTheme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';\n    setTheme(newTheme);\n    setCookie('theme', newTheme);\n}\n\nfunction setTheme(theme) {\n    currentTheme = theme;\n    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);\n    \n    const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');\n    const label = document.getElementById('themeLabel');\n    if (icon) {\n        icon.className = theme === 'light' ? 'fas fa-moon' : 'fas fa-sun';\n    }\n    if (label) {\n        label.textContent = theme === 'light' ? 'Dark' : 'Light';\n    }\n}\n\n// ========== 键盘导航 ==========\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n    if (!currentSessionId) return;\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' && currentNodeIndex > 0) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex - 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' && currentNodeIndex < groupedNodes.length - 1) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex + 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n        document.getElementById('mainLayout').classList.remove('has-selection');\n        currentSessionId = null;\n    }\n});\n\n// ========== 初始化 ==========\nfunction init() {\n    // 加载主题\n    const savedTheme = getCookie('theme') || 'light';\n    setTheme(savedTheme);\n    \n    // 加载展开模式\n    const savedMode = getCookie('expandMode');\n    if (savedMode === 'click' || savedMode === 'hover') {\n        expandMode = savedMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // 加载会话并自动选中最新的\n    loadSessions(1, true);\n    \n    // 搜索框事件\n    document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', debounce(filterSessions, 300));\n}\n\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n</script>\n{{end}}\n"
```json
}
```

```json
{
  "file_path": "d:\\Projects\\llm_chat_history_backend\\templates\\dashboard.html",
  "old_string": "// ========== 初始化 ==========\nfunction init() {\n    // 加载主题\n    const savedTheme = getCookie('theme') || 'light';\n    setTheme(savedTheme);\n    \n    // 加载展开模式\n    const savedMode = getCookie('expandMode');\n    if (savedMode === 'click' || savedMode === 'hover') {\n        expandMode = savedMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // 加载会话并自动选中最新的\n    loadSessions(1, true);\n    \n    // 搜索框事件\n    document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', debounce(filterSessions, 300));\n}",
  "new_string": "// ========== 初始化 ==========\nfunction init() {\n    // 加载主题\n    const savedTheme = getCookie('theme') || 'light';\n    setTheme(savedTheme);\n    \n    // 加载展开模式\n    const savedMode = getCookie('expandMode');\n    if (savedMode === 'click' || savedMode === 'hover') {\n        expandMode = savedMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // 加载视图模式\n    const savedViewMode = getCookie('viewMode');\n    if (savedViewMode === 'formatted' || savedViewMode === 'raw') {\n        viewMode = savedViewMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.view-mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === viewMode);\n        });\n        updateViewModeUI();\n    }\n    \n    // 加载会话并自动选中最新的\n    loadSessions(1, true);\n    \n    // 搜索框事件\n    document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', debounce(filterSessions, 300));\n}\n\n// ========== 视图模式控制 ==========\nfunction setViewMode(mode) {\n    viewMode = mode;\n    setCookie('viewMode', mode);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.view-mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === mode);\n    });\n    updateViewModeUI();\n    if (currentNodeIndex >= 0) selectNode(currentNodeIndex);\n}\n\nfunction updateViewModeUI() {\n    const expandModeToggle = document.getElementById('expandModeToggle');\n    const expandAllBtn = document.getElementById('expandAllBtn');\n    // 在 raw 模式下隐藏展开模式控制\n    if (viewMode === 'raw') {\n        expandModeToggle.style.display = 'none';\n        expandAllBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    } else {\n        expandModeToggle.style.display = 'flex';\n    }\n}"
}
```

id=\"expandModeToggle\">\n                        <button class=\"mode-btn active\" data-mode=\"click\" onclick=\"setExpandMode('click')\">Click</button>\n                        <button class=\"mode-btn\" data-mode=\"hover\" onclick=\"setExpandMode('hover')\">Hover</button>\n                    </div>\n                    <button class=\"expand-all-btn\" id=\"expandAllBtn\" onclick=\"toggleExpandAll()\" style=\"display: none;\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-expand-alt\"></i> All\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"detail-summary\" id=\"detailSummary\"></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"detail-body\" id=\"detailBody\">\n            <div class=\"empty-state\">\n                <i class=\"fas fa-hand-pointer\"></i>\n                <p>Select a message from timeline</p>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- 引入拆分后的 JS -->\n<script src=\"/static/js/utils.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/sessions.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/timeline.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/modules/detail.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/static/js/components/tool-diff.js\"></script>\n\n<script>\n// ========== 全局状态 ==========\nlet sessions = [];\nlet currentPage = 1;\nlet totalPages = 1;\nlet currentSessionId = null;\nlet allMessages = [];\nlet groupedNodes = [];\nlet currentNodeIndex = -1;\nlet expandMode = 'click';\nlet viewMode = 'formatted';  // 'formatted' or 'raw'\nlet allExpanded = false;\nlet showUserOnly = false;\nlet selectedUserNodeIndex = -1;\nlet currentTheme = 'light';\n\n// ========== 主题控制 ==========\nfunction toggleTheme() {\n    const newTheme = currentTheme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';\n    setTheme(newTheme);\n    setCookie('theme', newTheme);\n}\n\nfunction setTheme(theme) {\n    currentTheme = theme;\n    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);\n    \n    const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');\n    const label = document.getElementById('themeLabel');\n    if (icon) {\n        icon.className = theme === 'light' ? 'fas fa-moon' : 'fas fa-sun';\n    }\n    if (label) {\n        label.textContent = theme === 'light' ? 'Dark' : 'Light';\n    }\n}\n\n// ========== 键盘导航 ==========\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n    if (!currentSessionId) return;\n    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' && currentNodeIndex > 0) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex - 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' && currentNodeIndex < groupedNodes.length - 1) {\n        selectNode(currentNodeIndex + 1);\n        document.querySelector(`.timeline-node[data-index=\"${currentNodeIndex}\"]`)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });\n        e.preventDefault();\n    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n        document.getElementById('mainLayout').classList.remove('has-selection');\n        currentSessionId = null;\n    }\n});\n\n// ========== 初始化 ==========\nfunction init() {\n    // 加载主题\n    const savedTheme = getCookie('theme') || 'light';\n    setTheme(savedTheme);\n    \n    // 加载展开模式\n    const savedMode = getCookie('expandMode');\n    if (savedMode === 'click' || savedMode === 'hover') {\n        expandMode = savedMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === expandMode);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    // 加载视图模式\n    const savedViewMode = getCookie('viewMode');\n    if (savedViewMode === 'formatted' || savedViewMode === 'raw') {\n        viewMode = savedViewMode;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.view-mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === viewMode);\n        });\n        updateViewModeUI();\n    }\n    \n    // 加载会话并自动选中最新的\n    loadSessions(1, true);\n    \n    // 搜索框事件\n    document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', debounce(filterSessions, 300));\n}\n\n// ========== 视图模式控制 ==========\nfunction setViewMode(mode) {\n    viewMode = mode;\n    setCookie('viewMode', mode);\n    document.querySelectorAll('.view-mode-btn').forEach(btn => {\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === mode);\n    });\n    updateViewModeUI();\n    if (currentNodeIndex >= 0) selectNode(currentNodeIndex);\n}\n\nfunction updateViewModeUI() {\n    const expandModeToggle = document.getElementById('expandModeToggle');\n    const expandAllBtn = document.getElementById('expandAllBtn');\n    // 在 raw 模式下隐藏展开模式控制\n    if (viewMode === 'raw') {\n        expandModeToggle.style.display = 'none';\n        expandAllBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    } else {\n        expandModeToggle.style.display = 'flex';\n    }\n}\n\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);\n</script>\n{{end}}\n"
```json
}

'';\r\n    \r\n    // 解析环境详情中的各个部分\r\n    const sections = [];\r\n    const lines = envText.split('\\n');\r\n    let currentSection = null;\r\n    let currentContent = [];\r\n    \r\n    lines.forEach(line => {\r\n        if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\r\n            if (currentSection) {\r\n                sections.push({ title: currentSection, content: currentContent.join('\\n') });\r\n            }\r\n            currentSection = line.substring(2).trim();\r\n            currentContent = [];\r\n        } else {\r\n            currentContent.push(line);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n    if (currentSection) {\r\n        sections.push({ title: currentSection, content: currentContent.join('\\n') });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (sections.length === 0) {\r\n        return `<pre class=\"env-raw\">${escapeHtml(envText)}</pre>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    return sections.map(s => `\r\n        <div class=\"env-section\">\r\n            <div class=\"env-section-title\">${escapeHtml(s.title)}</div>\r\n            <div class=\"env-section-content\">${escapeHtml(s.content.trim())}</div>\r\n        </div>\r\n    `).join('');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ========== 展开模式控制 ==========\r\nfunction setExpandMode(mode) {\r\n    expandMode = mode;\r\n    setCookie('expandMode', mode);\r\n    document.querySelectorAll('.mode-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.mode === mode));\r\n    if (currentNodeIndex >= 0) selectNode(currentNodeIndex);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction toggleExpandAll() {\r\n    allExpanded = !allExpanded;\r\n    updateExpandAllBtn();\r\n    document.querySelectorAll('.item-card-header').forEach(header => {\r\n        const body = header.nextElementSibling;\r\n        const isFirst = header.closest('.item-card').dataset.index === '0';\r\n        if (allExpanded) {\r\n            header.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n            body.classList.remove('collapsed');\r\n        } else {\r\n            header.classList.toggle('collapsed', !isFirst);\r\n            body.classList.toggle('collapsed', !isFirst);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateExpandAllBtn() {\r\n    document.getElementById('expandAllBtn').innerHTML = allExpanded \r\n        ? '<i class=\"fas fa-compress-alt\"></i>' \r\n        : '<i class=\"fas fa-expand-alt\"></i> All';\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction toggleItemCard(header) {\r\n    if (expandMode === 'hover') return;\r\n    header.classList.toggle('collapsed');\r\n    header.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('collapsed');\r\n}\r\n\r\n"
}
```

```json
  "contents": "/* ========== Dashboard CSS ========== */\n/* 拆分自 dashboard.html，便于 AI 编程时节省 token */\n\n/* ========== 主题变量 ========== */\n:root {\n    --bg-primary: #fff;\n    --bg-secondary: #f8f9fa;\n    --bg-card: #fff;\n    --text-primary: #333;\n    --text-secondary: #666;\n    --text-muted: #999;\n    --border-color: #e9ecef;\n    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\n    /* Light 模式时间线用浅色 */\n    --timeline-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f4ff 0%, #e8ecf4 100%);\n    --timeline-text: #333;\n    --timeline-text-muted: #666;\n    --timeline-border: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\n    --timeline-node-line: rgba(0,0,0,0.12);\n    --user-node-bg: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.12);\n    --user-node-border: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.4);\n    --user-node-text: #1a5fb4;\n    --assistant-node-bg: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.08);\n    --assistant-node-border: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.35);\n    --assistant-node-text: #1b7a41;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] {\n    --bg-primary: #1a1a2e;\n    --bg-secondary: #16213e;\n    --bg-card: #1f2940;\n    --text-primary: #e4e4e7;\n    --text-secondary: #a1a1aa;\n    --text-muted: #71717a;\n    --border-color: #2d3748;\n    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);\n    /* Dark 模式时间线用深色 */\n    --timeline-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);\n    --timeline-text: #fff;\n    --timeline-text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n    --timeline-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    --timeline-node-line: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    --user-node-bg: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.2);\n    --user-node-border: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n    --user-node-text: #fff;\n    --assistant-node-bg: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.12);\n    --assistant-node-border: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.4);\n    --assistant-node-text: #fff;\n}\n\n/* ========== 三栏布局容器 ========== */\n.main-layout {\n    display: flex;\n    height: calc(100vh - 120px);\n    min-height: 600px;\n    gap: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n/* ========== 左侧会话列表 ========== */\n.sessions-panel {\n    width: 100%;\n    max-width: 900px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n    width: 260px;\n    min-width: 260px;\n    max-width: 260px;\n    margin: 0;\n    border-radius: 12px 0 0 12px;\n    opacity: 0.95;\n}\n\n.sessions-header {\n    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n    color: #fff;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.sessions-header h5 {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.sessions-header-btns {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.sessions-header-btns .btn {\n    padding: 0.35rem 0.6rem;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .sessions-header-btns .hide-on-select {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.sessions-search {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.search-input-wrapper {\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.search-input-wrapper .search-icon {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 12px;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.sessions-search input {\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    border-radius: 20px;\n    padding-left: 2.2rem;\n    padding-right: 2rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    border-color: var(--border-color);\n    width: 100%;\n}\n\n.sessions-search input:focus {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);\n}\n\n.search-clear-btn {\n    position: absolute;\n    right: 8px;\n    background: none;\n    border: none;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    cursor: pointer;\n    padding: 4px;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.search-clear-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .sessions-search input {\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n/* 搜索结果区域 */\n.search-results {\n    flex: 1;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.search-results-header {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n}\n\n.search-results-header .btn-link {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: #667eea;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    padding: 0;\n}\n\n.search-results-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #ddd;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n/* 搜索结果项 */\n.search-result-item {\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    transition: all 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.search-result-item:hover {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15);\n    transform: translateY(-1px);\n}\n\n.search-result-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.search-result-icon {\n    font-size: 1rem;\n}\n\n.search-result-title {\n    flex: 1;\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n}\n\n.search-result-source {\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    padding: 2px 6px;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.search-result-highlight {\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    max-height: 60px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.search-result-highlight mark {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);\n    color: inherit;\n    padding: 0 2px;\n    border-radius: 2px;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .search-result-highlight mark {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);\n}\n\n.search-result-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 1rem;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.search-result-meta i {\n    margin-right: 4px;\n}\n\n.sessions-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #ddd;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.session-item {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.session-item:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.session-item.active {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15) 0%, rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.15) 100%);\n    border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);\n}\n\n.session-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.session-item.active .session-title {\n    white-space: normal;\n    overflow: visible;\n    text-overflow: unset;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n}\n\n.session-meta {\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.session-meta span {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .session-meta {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n/* ========== 中间时间线面板 ========== */\n.timeline-panel {\n    width: 0;\n    min-width: 0;\n    background: var(--timeline-bg);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n    width: 300px;\n    min-width: 300px;\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection.user-filter-active .timeline-panel {\n    width: 400px;\n    min-width: 400px;\n}\n\n.timeline-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--timeline-border);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.timeline-title-row {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-duration {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n}\n\n.timeline-time-range {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-stats {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.stat-item {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.12rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    user-select: none;\n}\n\n.stat-item.active {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.3); \n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.7);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.assistant { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tools { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tool-result { background: rgba(250, 112, 154, 0.3); }\n\n.timeline-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n/* ========== 时间线节点 ========== */\n.timeline-node {\n    position: relative;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem 1.8rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.timeline-node:hover {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node {\n    background: var(--user-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.2);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.active {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25);\n    border-color: var(--user-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node {\n    background: var(--assistant-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.12);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node.active {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.15);\n    border-color: var(--assistant-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.context-node {\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    border-left-style: dashed;\n    margin-left: 0.5rem;\n    animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n@keyframes slideIn {\n    from {\n        opacity: 0;\n        transform: translateX(-10px);\n    }\n    to {\n        opacity: 0.85;\n        transform: translateX(0);\n    }\n}\n\n.context-label {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-node::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.6rem;\n    top: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    width: 2px;\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n}\n\n.timeline-node:first-child::before { top: 50%; }\n.timeline-node:last-child::before { bottom: 50%; }\n\n.timeline-node::after {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.35rem;\n    top: 1rem;\n    width: 7px;\n    height: 7px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: #667eea;\n    border: 2px solid var(--bg-card);\n    z-index: 1;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node::after { background: #4facfe; }\n.timeline-node.assistant-node::after { background: #43e97b; }\n\n.node-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.node-icon { font-size: 0.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.1rem; }\n\n.node-preview {\n    flex: 1;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n    display: -webkit-box;\n    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;\n    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--user-node-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--assistant-node-text);\n}\n\n.user-filter-active .timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    -webkit-line-clamp: unset;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* ========== Dive 图标（用户消息统计可点击提示） ========== */\n.stat-item.user {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.6;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    animation: divePulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n/* Hover 效果 */\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 激活状态（只看用户消息模式）下更明显 */\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    animation: divePulseStrong 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 轻微 */\n@keyframes divePulse {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0);\n        opacity: 0.6;\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(1px);\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 明显（过滤模式） */\n@keyframes divePulseStrong {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(2px) scale(1.15);\n    }\n}\n\n.node-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.node-time {\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n}\n\n.node-count-badge {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n}\n\n.node-sub-items {\n    margin-top: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.node-sub-item {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0;\n}\n\n/* AI 节点统计样式 */\n.node-stats-container {\n    flex: 1;\n    min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.node-stats-row {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.35rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    line-height: 1;\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    height: 1.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge.msg { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.25); }\n.node-stat-badge.thinking { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25); \n    /* 覆盖 base.html 中全局 .thinking 的样式 */\n    font-style: normal;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    margin-top: 0;\n}\n.node-stat-badge.tool { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.25); }\n\n.node-duration {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin-right: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-tools-detail {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n    margin-top: 0.3rem;\n    padding-left: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.tool-tag {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.15);\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3);\n}\n\n.tool-tag.more {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n}\n\n/* ========== 右侧详情面板 ========== */\n.detail-panel {\n    flex: 1;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    width: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .detail-panel {\n    opacity: 1;\n    width: auto;\n    flex: 1;\n}\n\n.detail-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n    color: #fff;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.detail-header-top {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.detail-header-left {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.6rem;\n}\n\n.detail-type-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }\n\n.detail-info h3 {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.detail-meta {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    margin-top: 0.05rem;\n}\n\n.detail-header-right {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.expand-mode-toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 15px;\n}\n\n.mode-btn {\n    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;\n    border: none;\n    background: transparent;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.mode-btn.active {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    border: none;\n    color: #fff;\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn:hover {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n}\n\n.detail-summary {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    margin-top: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.summary-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.detail-body {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--text-muted);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n/* ========== 卡片样式 ========== */\n.item-card {\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card:hover {\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);\n}\n\n.item-card-header {\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-header:hover {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n.item-card-icon {\n    width: 26px;\n    height: 26px;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-icon.message { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.thinking { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool-result { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fa709a 0%, #fee140 100%); }\n\n.item-card-title { flex: 1; }\n.item-card-title .title-main { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-primary); }\n.item-card-title .title-sub { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n\n.item-card-toggle {\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n\n.item-card-header.collapsed .item-card-toggle {\n    transform: rotate(-90deg);\n}\n\n.item-card-body {\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card-body.collapsed {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.hover-expand .item-card-body { display: none; }\n.hover-expand .item-card:hover .item-card-body { display: block; }\n.hover-expand .item-card-toggle { display: none; }\n\n.content-text {\n    line-height: 1.6;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.tool-code {\n    background: #1e1e1e;\n    color: #d4d4d4;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-family: 'Consolas', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    max-height: 250px;\n    overflow: auto;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n}\n\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n    height: 5px;\n}\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #555;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.empty-state {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    height: 100%;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.empty-state i {\n    font-size: 2rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.5;\n}\n\n/* ========== Cline/Kilo/BlackboxAI 环境详情样式 ========== */\n.item-card-icon.env {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);\n}\n\n.env-details {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n}\n\n.env-section {\n    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    border-left: 3px solid #38ef7d;\n}\n\n.env-section:last-child {\n    margin-bottom: 0;\n}\n\n.env-section-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: #38ef7d;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n.env-section-content {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.env-raw {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* 工具结果卡片图标 */\n.item-card-icon.tool-result {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);\n}\n\n/* Cline 风格用户消息中的工具结果标记 */\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview .tool-result-badge {\n    display: inline-block;\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.2);\n    color: #f093fb;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    margin-right: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n/* 时间线中的工具结果节点样式 */\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.08);\n    border-left-color: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.4);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.15);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #c77dff;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #e0aaff;\n}\n\n/* ========== 分页 ========== */\n.pagination-footer {\n    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn {\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn.active {\n    background: #667eea;\n    color: #fff;\n    border-color: #667eea;\n}\n\n/* ========== 响应式 ========== */\n@media (max-width: 1200px) {\n    .main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n        width: 220px;\n        min-width: 220px;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n        width: 260px;\n        min-width: 260px;\n    }\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 992px) {\n    .main-layout {\n        flex-direction: column;\n        height: auto;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n
```
