  "contents": "/**\n * 时间线模块\n * 负责中间 Timeline 面板的渲染和交互\n */\n\n// ========== 消息分组 ==========\nfunction groupMessages(messages) {\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    if (isClineStyle) {\n        return groupClineMessages(messages);\n    }\n    return groupCursorMessages(messages);\n}\n\n// Cursor 风格分组：连续 assistant 消息合并\nfunction groupCursorMessages(messages) {\n    const groups = [];\n    let currentGroup = null;\n\n    messages.forEach(msg => {\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\n            if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n            groups.push({ type: 'user', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp });\n            currentGroup = null;\n        } else {\n            if (currentGroup?.type === 'assistant') {\n                currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\n            } else {\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                currentGroup = { type: 'assistant', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp };\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n    return groups;\n}\n\n// Cline/Kilo/BlackboxAI 风格分组：工具结果与 AI 回复合并\nfunction groupClineMessages(messages) {\n    const groups = [];\n    let currentGroup = null;\n\n    messages.forEach(msg => {\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n            const isRealUserTask = !!parsed.task;\n            \n            if (isRealUserTask) {\n                // 真正的用户提问：结束当前组，创建新的用户节点\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                groups.push({ type: 'user', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp });\n                currentGroup = null;\n            } else {\n                // 工具结果：合并到当前 AI 组，或创建新的 AI 组\n                if (currentGroup?.type === 'assistant') {\n                    currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\n                } else {\n                    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                    currentGroup = { type: 'assistant', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp };\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            // assistant 消息：合并到当前 AI 组\n            if (currentGroup?.type === 'assistant') {\n                currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\n            } else {\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                currentGroup = { type: 'assistant', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp };\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n    return groups;\n}\n\n// ========== 时间线头部渲染 ==========\nfunction renderTimelineHeader() {\n    if (allMessages.length === 0) return;\n    \n    const firstTime = new Date(allMessages[0].timestamp);\n    const lastTime = new Date(allMessages[allMessages.length - 1].timestamp);\n    const durationMs = lastTime - firstTime;\n    \n    document.getElementById('timelineDuration').textContent = formatDuration(durationMs);\n    document.getElementById('timelineTimeRange').textContent = \n        `${firstTime.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})} → ${lastTime.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}`;\n}\n\n// ========== 统计信息渲染 ==========\nfunction renderStats() {\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    let userCount = 0, assistantMsgCount = 0, toolUseCount = 0, toolResultCount = 0;\n    \n    allMessages.forEach(msg => {\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n                if (parsed.task) {\n                    userCount++;\n                } else if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                    toolResultCount += parsed.toolResults.length;\n                } else {\n                    toolResultCount++;\n                }\n            } else {\n                userCount++;\n            }\n        } else {\n            if (msg.content?.trim()) assistantMsgCount++;\n            if (msg.tool_uses) try { toolUseCount += JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).length; } catch(e) {}\n            \n            // Cline 风格：从 assistant 消息中提取工具调用\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineAssistantMessage(msg.content);\n                if (parsed.toolCall) toolUseCount++;\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    const userActive = showUserOnly ? 'active filtering' : 'active';\n    \n    let statsHtml = `\n        <span class=\"stat-item user ${userActive}\" onclick=\"toggleUserFilter()\" title=\"Click to dive into user messages\">\n            💬 ${userCount}\n            <span class=\"dive-indicator\">\n                <span class=\"dive-text\">Dive</span>\n                <span class=\"dive-icon\">⤵</span>\n            </span>\n        </span>\n        <span class=\"stat-item assistant active\">🤖 ${assistantMsgCount}</span>\n        <span class=\"stat-item tools active\">🔧 ${toolUseCount}</span>\n    `;\n    \n    if (toolResultCount > 0) {\n        statsHtml += `<span class=\"stat-item tool-result active\">📋 ${toolResultCount}</span>`;\n    }\n    \n    document.getElementById('timelineStats').innerHTML = statsHtml;\n}\n\n// ========== 用户消息过滤 ==========\nfunction toggleUserFilter() {\n    showUserOnly = !showUserOnly;\n    selectedUserNodeIndex = -1;\n    \n    document.getElementById('mainLayout').classList.toggle('user-filter-active', showUserOnly);\n    \n    renderStats();\n    renderTimeline();\n    \n    const visibleNodes = getFilteredNodes();\n    if (visibleNodes.length > 0) {\n        if (showUserOnly) {\n            const firstUserNode = visibleNodes.find(n => n.type === 'user');\n            if (firstUserNode) {\n                selectNode(firstUserNode.originalIndex);\n            }\n        } else {\n            selectNode(visibleNodes[0].originalIndex);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfunction getFilteredNodes() {\n    if (!showUserOnly) {\n        return groupedNodes.map((node, idx) => ({ ...node, originalIndex: idx }));\n    }\n    \n    const result = [];\n    \n    groupedNodes.forEach((node, idx) => {\n        if (node.type === 'user') {\n            result.push({ ...node, originalIndex: idx, isContextNode: false });\n        } else if (selectedUserNodeIndex >= 0) {\n            const isPrevAI = idx === selectedUserNodeIndex - 1;\n            const isNextAI = idx === selectedUserNodeIndex + 1;\n            \n            if (isPrevAI || isNextAI) {\n                result.push({ ...node, originalIndex: idx, isContextNode: true });\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    result.sort((a, b) => a.originalIndex - b.originalIndex);\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\n// ========== 节点摘要信息 ==========\nfunction getNodeSummary(node) {\n    let preview = '', subItems = [], itemCount = 0;\n    let messageCount = 0, thinkingCount = 0;\n    let toolCounts = {};\n    let toolResultCount = 0;\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    if (node.type === 'user') {\n        if (isClineStyle) {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n            if (parsed.task) {\n                preview = getTextPreview(parsed.task, 80);\n            } else if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                const tr = parsed.toolResults[0];\n                preview = `📋 [${tr.name}] ${tr.target || ''}`.substring(0, 80);\n                parsed.toolResults.forEach(tr => {\n                    toolCounts[tr.name] = (toolCounts[tr.name] || 0) + 1;\n                });\n            } else {\n                preview = getTextPreview(node.messages[0].content, 80);\n            }\n        } else {\n            preview = getTextPreview(node.messages[0].content, 80);\n        }\n        itemCount = 1;\n    } else {\n        // AI 节点（可能包含工具结果消息）\n        node.messages.forEach(msg => {\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                // Cline 风格：检查是 user 消息（工具结果）还是 assistant 消息\n                if (msg.type === 'user') {\n                    // 这是合并进来的工具结果消息\n                    const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n                    if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                        parsed.toolResults.forEach(tr => {\n                            subItems.push({ icon: '📋', text: `${tr.name}: ${tr.target || 'result'}`, type: 'tool-result' });\n                            toolCounts[tr.name] = (toolCounts[tr.name] || 0) + 1;\n                            toolResultCount++;\n                            itemCount++;\n                        });\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    // assistant 消息：解析结构化内容\n                    const parsed = parseClineAssistantMessage(msg.content);\n                    \n                    if (parsed.thinking) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💭', text: getTextPreview(parsed.thinking, 20), type: 'thinking' });\n                        thinkingCount++;\n                    }\n                    if (parsed.reply && parsed.reply.trim()) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(parsed.reply, 20), type: 'message' });\n                        messageCount++;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                    if (parsed.toolCall) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '🔧', text: parsed.toolCall, type: 'tool' });\n                        toolCounts[parsed.toolCall] = (toolCounts[parsed.toolCall] || 0) + 1;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                    // 如果没有解析到结构化内容，但有原始内容\n                    if (!parsed.thinking && !parsed.reply && !parsed.toolCall && msg.content?.trim()) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(msg.content, 20), type: 'message' });\n                        messageCount++;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Cursor 风格\n                if (msg.content?.trim()) {\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(msg.content, 20), type: 'message' });\n                    messageCount++;\n                    itemCount++;\n                }\n                if (msg.thinking) {\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '💭', text: 'Thinking', type: 'thinking' });\n                    thinkingCount++;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            // 工具使用 - 所有来源通用\n            if (msg.tool_uses) try {\n                JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).forEach(t => {\n                    const toolName = t.name || 'Tool';\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '🔧', text: toolName, type: 'tool' });\n                    toolCounts[toolName] = (toolCounts[toolName] || 0) + 1;\n                    itemCount++;\n                });\n            } catch(e) {}\n        });\n        preview = subItems.length > 0 ? (subItems[0].type === 'tool' ? `🔧 ${subItems[0].text}` : subItems[0].text) : '(empty)';\n    }\n    \n    const totalToolCount = Object.values(toolCounts).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);\n    \n    return { preview, subItems, itemCount, messageCount, thinkingCount, toolCounts, totalToolCount, toolResultCount };\n}\n\nfunction getFullPreview(node) {\n    if (node.type === 'user' && node.messages[0]?.content) {\n        const source = getSessionSource();\n        if (source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai') {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n            if (parsed.task) {\n                return parsed.task;\n            }\n            if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                const tr = parsed.toolResults[0];\n                return `📋 [${tr.name}] ${tr.target}\\n${getTextPreview(tr.result, 200)}`;\n            }\n        }\n        return node.messages[0].content.trim();\n    }\n    return getTextPreview(node.messages[0]?.content, 50);\n}\n\n// ========== 时间线渲染 ==========\nfunction renderTimeline() {\n    const container = document.getElementById('timelineList');\n    const filteredNodes = getFilteredNodes();\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) {\n        container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-white-50 py-3\">No messages</div>';\n        return;\n    }\n\n    container.innerHTML = filteredNodes.map((node, displayIdx) => {\n        const idx = node.originalIndex;\n        const isUser = node.type === 'user';\n        const isContext = node.isContextNode || false;\n        const time = new Date(node.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});\n        const { preview, subItems, itemCount, messageCount, thinkingCount, toolCounts, totalToolCount } = getNodeSummary(node);\n        \n        const displayPreview = (showUserOnly && isUser) ? getFullPreview(node) : preview;\n        const contextClass = isContext ? 'context-node' : '';\n        \n        // 计算 AI 节点的耗时\n        let nodeDuration = '';\n        if (!isUser && node.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMsgTime = new Date(node.messages[0].timestamp).getTime();\n            const lastMsgTime = new Date(node.messages[node.messages.length - 1].timestamp).getTime();\n            const durationMs = lastMsgTime - firstMsgTime;\n            if (durationMs > 0) {\n                nodeDuration = formatDuration(durationMs);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (isUser) {\n            // 判断是否是工具结果消息（Cline 风格）\n            let isToolResult = false;\n            let icon = '💬';\n            let extraClass = '';\n            \n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n                if (!parsed.task && parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                    isToolResult = true;\n                    icon = '📋';\n                    extraClass = 'tool-result-node';\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return `\n                <div class=\"timeline-node user-node ${contextClass} ${extraClass}\" data-index=\"${idx}\" onclick=\"selectNode(${idx})\">\n                    <div class=\"node-header\">\n                        <span class=\"node-icon\">${icon}</span>\n                        <span class=\"node-preview\">${escapeHtml(displayPreview)}</span>\n                        <div class=\"node-meta\">\n                            <span class=\"node-time\">${time}</span>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        } else {\n            // AI 节点：显示统计信息和 tool 明细\n            const statsLine = [];\n            if (messageCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge msg\">💬 ${messageCount}</span>`);\n            if (thinkingCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge thinking\">💭 ${thinkingCount}</span>`);\n            if (totalToolCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge tool\">🔧 ${totalToolCount}</span>`);\n            \n            const topTools = Object.entries(toolCounts)\n                .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])\n                .slice(0, 4);\n            \n            return `\n                <div class=\"timeline-node assistant-node ${contextClass}\" data-index=\"${idx}\" onclick=\"selectNode(${idx})\">\n                    ${isContext ? '<div class=\"context-label\">AI Response</div>' : ''}\n                    <div class=\"node-header\">\n                        <span class=\"node-icon\">🤖</span>\n                        <div class=\"node-stats-container\">\n                            <div class=\"node-stats-row\">${statsLine.join('')}</div>\n                        </div>\n                        <div class=\"node-meta\">\n                            ${nodeDuration ? `<span class=\"node-duration\">${nodeDuration}</span>` : ''}\n                            <span class=\"node-time\">${time}</span>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    ${topTools.length > 0 ? `\n                        <div class=\"node-tools-detail\">\n                            ${topTools.map(([name, count]) => `\n                                <span class=\"tool-tag\">${name}${count > 1 ? ` ×${count}` : ''}</span>\n                            `).join('')}\n                            ${Object.keys(toolCounts).length > 4 ? `<span class=\"tool-tag more\">+${Object.keys(toolCounts).length - 4}</span>` : ''}\n                        </div>\n                    ` : ''}\n                </div>\n            `;\n        }\n    }).join('');\n}\n\n",

messages.forEach(msg => {\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n            const isRealUserTask = !!parsed.task;\n            \n            if (isRealUserTask) {\n                // 真正的用户提问：结束当前组，创建新的用户节点\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                groups.push({ type: 'user', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp });\n                currentGroup = null;\n            } else {\n                // 工具结果：合并到当前 AI 组，或创建新的 AI 组\n                if (currentGroup?.type === 'assistant') {\n                    currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\n                } else {\n                    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                    currentGroup = { type: 'assistant', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp };\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            // assistant 消息：合并到当前 AI 组\n            if (currentGroup?.type === 'assistant') {\n                currentGroup.messages.push(msg);\n            } else {\n                if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n                currentGroup = { type: 'assistant', messages: [msg], timestamp: msg.timestamp };\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    if (currentGroup) groups.push(currentGroup);\n    return groups;\n}\n\n// ========== 时间线头部渲染 ==========\nfunction renderTimelineHeader() {\n    if (allMessages.length === 0) return;\n    \n    const firstTime = new Date(allMessages[0].timestamp);\n    const lastTime = new Date(allMessages[allMessages.length - 1].timestamp);\n    const durationMs = lastTime - firstTime;\n    \n    document.getElementById('timelineDuration').textContent = formatDuration(durationMs);\n    \n    // 时间范围 + workspace 信息\n    let timeRangeHtml = `${firstTime.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})} → ${lastTime.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}`;\n    \n    // 显示 workspace 信息\n    if (typeof currentSession !== 'undefined' && currentSession && currentSession.workspace_name) {\n        timeRangeHtml += ` <span class=\"timeline-workspace\" title=\"${escapeHtml(currentSession.workspace_path || currentSession.workspace_name)}\">\n            <i class=\"fas fa-folder\"></i> ${escapeHtml(currentSession.workspace_name)}\n        </span>`;\n    }\n    \n    document.getElementById('timelineTimeRange').innerHTML = timeRangeHtml;\n}\n\n// ========== 统计信息渲染 ==========\nfunction renderStats() {\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    let userCount = 0, assistantMsgCount = 0, toolUseCount = 0, toolResultCount = 0;\n    \n    allMessages.forEach(msg => {\n        if (msg.type === 'user') {\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n                if (parsed.task) {\n                    userCount++;\n                } else if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                    toolResultCount += parsed.toolResults.length;\n                } else {\n                    toolResultCount++;\n                }\n            } else {\n                userCount++;\n            }\n        } else {\n            if (msg.content?.trim()) assistantMsgCount++;\n            if (msg.tool_uses) try { toolUseCount += JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).length; } catch(e) {}\n            \n            // Cline 风格：从 assistant 消息中提取工具调用\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineAssistantMessage(msg.content);\n                if (parsed.toolCall) toolUseCount++;\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    const userActive = showUserOnly ? 'active filtering' : 'active';\n    \n    let statsHtml = `\n        <span class=\"stat-item user ${userActive}\" onclick=\"toggleUserFilter()\" title=\"Click to dive into user messages\">\n            💬 ${userCount}\n            <span class=\"dive-indicator\">\n                <span class=\"dive-text\">Dive</span>\n                <span class=\"dive-icon\">⤵</span>\n            </span>\n        </span>\n        <span class=\"stat-item assistant active\">🤖 ${assistantMsgCount}</span>\n        <span class=\"stat-item tools active\">🔧 ${toolUseCount}</span>\n    `;\n    \n    if (toolResultCount > 0) {\n        statsHtml += `<span class=\"stat-item tool-result active\">📋 ${toolResultCount}</span>`;\n    }\n    \n    document.getElementById('timelineStats').innerHTML = statsHtml;\n}\n\n// ========== 用户消息过滤 ==========\nfunction toggleUserFilter() {\n    showUserOnly = !showUserOnly;\n    selectedUserNodeIndex = -1;\n    \n    document.getElementById('mainLayout').classList.toggle('user-filter-active', showUserOnly);\n    \n    renderStats();\n    renderTimeline();\n    \n    const visibleNodes = getFilteredNodes();\n    if (visibleNodes.length > 0) {\n        if (showUserOnly) {\n            const firstUserNode = visibleNodes.find(n => n.type === 'user');\n            if (firstUserNode) {\n                selectNode(firstUserNode.originalIndex);\n            }\n        } else {\n            selectNode(visibleNodes[0].originalIndex);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfunction getFilteredNodes() {\n    if (!showUserOnly) {\n        return groupedNodes.map((node, idx) => ({ ...node, originalIndex: idx }));\n    }\n    \n    const result = [];\n    \n    groupedNodes.forEach((node, idx) => {\n        if (node.type === 'user') {\n            result.push({ ...node, originalIndex: idx, isContextNode: false });\n        } else if (selectedUserNodeIndex >= 0) {\n            const isPrevAI = idx === selectedUserNodeIndex - 1;\n            const isNextAI = idx === selectedUserNodeIndex + 1;\n            \n            if (isPrevAI || isNextAI) {\n                result.push({ ...node, originalIndex: idx, isContextNode: true });\n            }\n        }\n    });\n    \n    result.sort((a, b) => a.originalIndex - b.originalIndex);\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\n// ========== 节点摘要信息 ==========\nfunction getNodeSummary(node) {\n    let preview = '', subItems = [], itemCount = 0;\n    let messageCount = 0, thinkingCount = 0;\n    let toolCounts = {};\n    let toolResultCount = 0;\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    if (node.type === 'user') {\n        if (isClineStyle) {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n            if (parsed.task) {\n                preview = getTextPreview(parsed.task, 80);\n            } else if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                const tr = parsed.toolResults[0];\n                preview = `📋 [${tr.name}] ${tr.target || ''}`.substring(0, 80);\n                parsed.toolResults.forEach(tr => {\n                    toolCounts[tr.name] = (toolCounts[tr.name] || 0) + 1;\n                });\n            } else {\n                preview = getTextPreview(node.messages[0].content, 80);\n            }\n        } else {\n            preview = getTextPreview(node.messages[0].content, 80);\n        }\n        itemCount = 1;\n    } else {\n        // AI 节点（可能包含工具结果消息）\n        node.messages.forEach(msg => {\n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                // Cline 风格：检查是 user 消息（工具结果）还是 assistant 消息\n                if (msg.type === 'user') {\n                    // 这是合并进来的工具结果消息\n                    const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(msg.content);\n                    if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                        parsed.toolResults.forEach(tr => {\n                            subItems.push({ icon: '📋', text: `${tr.name}: ${tr.target || 'result'}`, type: 'tool-result' });\n                            toolCounts[tr.name] = (toolCounts[tr.name] || 0) + 1;\n                            toolResultCount++;\n                            itemCount++;\n                        });\n                    }\n                } else {\n                    // assistant 消息：解析结构化内容\n                    const parsed = parseClineAssistantMessage(msg.content);\n                    \n                    if (parsed.thinking) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💭', text: getTextPreview(parsed.thinking, 20), type: 'thinking' });\n                        thinkingCount++;\n                    }\n                    if (parsed.reply && parsed.reply.trim()) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(parsed.reply, 20), type: 'message' });\n                        messageCount++;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                    if (parsed.toolCall) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '🔧', text: parsed.toolCall, type: 'tool' });\n                        toolCounts[parsed.toolCall] = (toolCounts[parsed.toolCall] || 0) + 1;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                    // 如果没有解析到结构化内容，但有原始内容\n                    if (!parsed.thinking && !parsed.reply && !parsed.toolCall && msg.content?.trim()) {\n                        subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(msg.content, 20), type: 'message' });\n                        messageCount++;\n                        itemCount++;\n                    }\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Cursor 风格\n                if (msg.content?.trim()) {\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '💬', text: getTextPreview(msg.content, 20), type: 'message' });\n                    messageCount++;\n                    itemCount++;\n                }\n                if (msg.thinking) {\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '💭', text: 'Thinking', type: 'thinking' });\n                    thinkingCount++;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            // 工具使用 - 所有来源通用\n            if (msg.tool_uses) try {\n                JSON.parse(msg.tool_uses).forEach(t => {\n                    const toolName = t.name || 'Tool';\n                    subItems.push({ icon: '🔧', text: toolName, type: 'tool' });\n                    toolCounts[toolName] = (toolCounts[toolName] || 0) + 1;\n                    itemCount++;\n                });\n            } catch(e) {}\n        });\n        preview = subItems.length > 0 ? (subItems[0].type === 'tool' ? `🔧 ${subItems[0].text}` : subItems[0].text) : '(empty)';\n    }\n    \n    const totalToolCount = Object.values(toolCounts).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);\n    \n    return { preview, subItems, itemCount, messageCount, thinkingCount, toolCounts, totalToolCount, toolResultCount };\n}\n\nfunction getFullPreview(node) {\n    if (node.type === 'user' && node.messages[0]?.content) {\n        const source = getSessionSource();\n        if (source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai') {\n            const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n            if (parsed.task) {\n                return parsed.task;\n            }\n            if (parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                const tr = parsed.toolResults[0];\n                return `📋 [${tr.name}] ${tr.target}\\n${getTextPreview(tr.result, 200)}`;\n            }\n        }\n        return node.messages[0].content.trim();\n    }\n    return getTextPreview(node.messages[0]?.content, 50);\n}\n\n// ========== 时间线渲染 ==========\nfunction renderTimeline() {\n    const container = document.getElementById('timelineList');\n    const filteredNodes = getFilteredNodes();\n    const source = getSessionSource();\n    const isClineStyle = source === 'cline' || source === 'kilo' || source === 'blackboxai';\n    \n    if (filteredNodes.length === 0) {\n        container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-white-50 py-3\">No messages</div>';\n        return;\n    }\n\n    container.innerHTML = filteredNodes.map((node, displayIdx) => {\n        const idx = node.originalIndex;\n        const isUser = node.type === 'user';\n        const isContext = node.isContextNode || false;\n        const time = new Date(node.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});\n        const { preview, subItems, itemCount, messageCount, thinkingCount, toolCounts, totalToolCount } = getNodeSummary(node);\n        \n        const displayPreview = (showUserOnly && isUser) ? getFullPreview(node) : preview;\n        const contextClass = isContext ? 'context-node' : '';\n        \n        // 计算 AI 节点的耗时\n        let nodeDuration = '';\n        if (!isUser && node.messages.length > 0) {\n            const firstMsgTime = new Date(node.messages[0].timestamp).getTime();\n            const lastMsgTime = new Date(node.messages[node.messages.length - 1].timestamp).getTime();\n            const durationMs = lastMsgTime - firstMsgTime;\n            if (durationMs > 0) {\n                nodeDuration = formatDuration(durationMs);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (isUser) {\n            // 判断是否是工具结果消息（Cline 风格）\n            let isToolResult = false;\n            let icon = '💬';\n            let extraClass = '';\n            \n            if (isClineStyle) {\n                const parsed = parseClineUserMessage(node.messages[0].content);\n                if (!parsed.task && parsed.toolResults.length > 0) {\n                    isToolResult = true;\n                    icon = '📋';\n                    extraClass = 'tool-result-node';\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return `\n                <div class=\"timeline-node user-node ${contextClass} ${extraClass}\" data-index=\"${idx}\" onclick=\"selectNode(${idx})\">\n                    <div class=\"node-header\">\n                        <span class=\"node-icon\">${icon}</span>\n                        <span class=\"node-preview\">${escapeHtml(displayPreview)}</span>\n                        <div class=\"node-meta\">\n                            <span class=\"node-time\">${time}</span>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        } else {\n            // AI 节点：显示统计信息和 tool 明细\n            const statsLine = [];\n            if (messageCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge msg\">💬 ${messageCount}</span>`);\n            if (thinkingCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge thinking\">💭 ${thinkingCount}</span>`);\n            if (totalToolCount > 0) statsLine.push(`<span class=\"node-stat-badge tool\">🔧 ${totalToolCount}</span>`);\n            \n            const topTools = Object.entries(toolCounts)\n                .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])\n                .slice(0, 4);\n            \n            return `\n                <div class=\"timeline-node assistant-node ${contextClass}\" data-index=\"${idx}\" onclick=\"selectNode(${idx})\">\n                    ${isContext ? '<div class=\"context-label\">AI Response</div>' : ''}\n                    <div class=\"node-header\">\n                        <span class=\"node-icon\">🤖</span>\n                        <div class=\"node-stats-container\">\n                            <div class=\"node-stats-row\">${statsLine.join('')}</div>\n                        </div>\n                        <div class=\"node-meta\">\n                            ${nodeDuration ? `<span class=\"node-duration\">${nodeDuration}</span>` : ''}\n                            <span class=\"node-time\">${time}</span>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    ${topTools.length > 0 ? `\n                        <div class=\"node-tools-detail\">\n                            ${topTools.map(([name, count]) => `\n                                <span class=\"tool-tag\">${name}${count > 1 ? ` ×${count}` : ''}</span>\n                            `).join('')}\n                            ${Object.keys(toolCounts).length > 4 ? `<span class=\"tool-tag more\">+${Object.keys(toolCounts).length - 4}</span>` : ''}\n                        </div>\n                    ` : ''}\n                </div>\n            `;\n        }\n    }).join('');\n}\n\n"
}

var(--bg-secondary);\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    min-width: 20px;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.workspace-item.active .workspace-count {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n/* ========== 时间线 Workspace 显示 ========== */\n.timeline-workspace {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n   "resultForModel": "The file d:\\Projects\\llm_chat_history_backend\\static\\css\\dashboard.css has been updated.",
  "contentsAfterEdit": "/* ========== Dashboard CSS ========== */\n/* 拆分自 dashboard.html，便于 AI 编程时节省 token */\n\n/* ========== 主题变量 ========== */\n:root {\n    --bg-primary: #fff;\n    --bg-secondary: #f8f9fa;\n    --bg-card: #fff;\n    --text-primary: #333;\n    --text-secondary: #666;\n    --text-muted: #999;\n    --border-color: #e9ecef;\n    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\n    /* Light 模式时间线用浅色 */\n    --timeline-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f4ff 0%, #e8ecf4 100%);\n    --timeline-text: #333;\n    --timeline-text-muted: #666;\n    --timeline-border: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);\n    --timeline-node-line: rgba(0,0,0,0.12);\n    --user-node-bg: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.12);\n    --user-node-border: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.4);\n    --user-node-text: #1a5fb4;\n    --assistant-node-bg: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.08);\n    --assistant-node-border: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.35);\n    --assistant-node-text: #1b7a41;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] {\n    --bg-primary: #1a1a2e;\n    --bg-secondary: #16213e;\n    --bg-card: #1f2940;\n    --text-primary: #e4e4e7;\n    --text-secondary: #a1a1aa;\n    --text-muted: #71717a;\n    --border-color: #2d3748;\n    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);\n    /* Dark 模式时间线用深色 */\n    --timeline-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);\n    --timeline-text: #fff;\n    --timeline-text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n    --timeline-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    --timeline-node-line: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    --user-node-bg: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.2);\n    --user-node-border: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n    --user-node-text: #fff;\n    --assistant-node-bg: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.12);\n    --assistant-node-border: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.4);\n    --assistant-node-text: #fff;\n}\n\n/* ========== 三栏布局容器 ========== */\n.main-layout {\n    display: flex;\n    height: calc(100vh - 120px);\n    min-height: 600px;\n    gap: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n/* ========== 左侧会话列表 ========== */\n.sessions-panel {\n    width: 100%;\n    max-width: 900px;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n    width: 260px;\n    min-width: 260px;\n    max-width: 260px;\n    margin: 0;\n    border-radius: 12px 0 0 12px;\n    opacity: 0.95;\n}\n\n.sessions-header {\n    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n    color: #fff;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.sessions-header h5 {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.sessions-header-btns {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.sessions-header-btns .btn {\n    padding: 0.35rem 0.6rem;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .sessions-header-btns .hide-on-select {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.sessions-search {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.search-input-wrapper {\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.search-input-wrapper .search-icon {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 12px;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.sessions-search input {\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    border-radius: 20px;\n    padding-left: 2.2rem;\n    padding-right: 2rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    border-color: var(--border-color);\n    width: 100%;\n}\n\n.sessions-search input:focus {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);\n}\n\n.search-clear-btn {\n    position: absolute;\n    right: 8px;\n    background: none;\n    border: none;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    cursor: pointer;\n    padding: 4px;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.search-clear-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .sessions-search input {\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n/* 搜索结果区域 */\n.search-results {\n    flex: 1;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.search-results-header {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n}\n\n.search-results-header .btn-link {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: #667eea;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    padding: 0;\n}\n\n.search-results-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.search-results-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #ddd;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n/* 搜索结果项 */\n.search-result-item {\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    transition: all 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.search-result-item:hover {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15);\n    transform: translateY(-1px);\n}\n\n.search-result-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.search-result-icon {\n    font-size: 1rem;\n}\n\n.search-result-title {\n    flex: 1;\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n}\n\n.search-result-source {\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    padding: 2px 6px;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.search-result-highlight {\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    max-height: 60px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.search-result-highlight mark {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);\n    color: inherit;\n    padding: 0 2px;\n    border-radius: 2px;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .search-result-highlight mark {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);\n}\n\n.search-result-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 1rem;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.search-result-meta i {\n    margin-right: 4px;\n}\n\n/* ========== Workspace 筛选器 ========== */\n.workspace-filter {\n    position: relative;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.workspace-filter-btn {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    width: 100%;\n}\n\n.workspace-filter-btn:hover {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15);\n}\n\n.workspace-filter-btn.active {\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.08);\n}\n\n.workspace-filter-btn i:first-child {\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n#workspaceFilterLabel {\n    flex: 1;\n    text-align: left;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n}\n\n.workspace-chevron {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    transition: transform 0.2s;\n}\n\n.workspace-filter-btn.active .workspace-chevron {\n    transform: rotate(180deg);\n}\n\n.workspace-dropdown {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 100%;\n    left: 0.75rem;\n    right: 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);\n    z-index: 100;\n    margin-top: 0.25rem;\n    max-height: 300px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.workspace-dropdown-header {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n.workspace-clear-btn {\n    background: none;\n    border: none;\n    color: #667eea;\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.workspace-clear-btn:hover {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1);\n}\n\n.workspace-list {\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.25rem;\n    flex: 1;\n}\n\n.workspace-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 4px;\n}\n\n.workspace-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n\n.workspace-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 2px;\n}\n\n.workspace-item {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.65rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.15s;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n}\n\n.workspace-item:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.workspace-item.active {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15);\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n.workspace-item i {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    width: 16px;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.workspace-item.active i {\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n.workspace-name {\n    flex: 1;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n}\n\n.workspace-count {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    min-width: 20px;\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.workspace-item.active .workspace-count {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n/* ========== 时间线 Workspace 显示 ========== */\n.timeline-workspace {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-left: 0.5rem;\n    max-width: 120px;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n    cursor: help;\n}\n\n.timeline-workspace i {\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.sessions-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #ddd;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.session-item {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.session-item:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.session-item.active {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.15) 0%, rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.15) 100%);\n    border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);\n}\n\n.session-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    text-overflow: ellipsis;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.session-item.active .session-title {\n    white-space: normal;\n    overflow: visible;\n    text-overflow: unset;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n}\n\n.session-meta {\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.session-meta span {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .session-meta {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n/* ========== 中间时间线面板 ========== */\n.timeline-panel {\n    width: 0;\n    min-width: 0;\n    background: var(--timeline-bg);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n    width: 300px;\n    min-width: 300px;\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection.user-filter-active .timeline-panel {\n    width: 400px;\n    min-width: 400px;\n}\n\n.timeline-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--timeline-border);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.timeline-title-row {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-duration {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n}\n\n.timeline-time-range {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-stats {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.stat-item {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.12rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    user-select: none;\n}\n\n.stat-item.active {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.3); \n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.7);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5);\n}\n\n.stat-item.assistant { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tools { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3); }\n.stat-item.tool-result { background: rgba(250, 112, 154, 0.3); }\n\n.timeline-list {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n}\n.timeline-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n/* ========== 时间线节点 ========== */\n.timeline-node {\n    position: relative;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem 1.8rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 1px solid transparent;\n}\n\n.timeline-node:hover {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node {\n    background: var(--user-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.2);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.active {\n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25);\n    border-color: var(--user-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--user-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node {\n    background: var(--assistant-node-bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.12);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node.active {\n    background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.15);\n    border-color: var(--assistant-node-border);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--assistant-node-border);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.context-node {\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    border-left-style: dashed;\n    margin-left: 0.5rem;\n    animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n@keyframes slideIn {\n    from {\n        opacity: 0;\n        transform: translateX(-10px);\n    }\n    to {\n        opacity: 0.85;\n        transform: translateX(0);\n    }\n}\n\n.context-label {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.timeline-node::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.6rem;\n    top: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    width: 2px;\n    background: var(--timeline-node-line);\n}\n\n.timeline-node:first-child::before { top: 50%; }\n.timeline-node:last-child::before { bottom: 50%; }\n\n.timeline-node::after {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 0.35rem;\n    top: 1rem;\n    width: 7px;\n    height: 7px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: #667eea;\n    border: 2px solid var(--bg-card);\n    z-index: 1;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node::after { background: #4facfe; }\n.timeline-node.assistant-node::after { background: #43e97b; }\n\n.node-header {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.node-icon { font-size: 0.8rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.1rem; }\n\n.node-preview {\n    flex: 1;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n    display: -webkit-box;\n    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;\n    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--user-node-text);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.assistant-node .node-preview {\n    color: var(--assistant-node-text);\n}\n\n.user-filter-active .timeline-node.user-node .node-preview {\n    -webkit-line-clamp: unset;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* ========== Dive 图标（用户消息统计可点击提示） ========== */\n.stat-item.user {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator {\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.6;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    animation: divePulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    font-size: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n/* Hover 效果 */\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user:hover .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 激活状态（只看用户消息模式）下更明显 */\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator {\n    opacity: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-icon {\n    animation: divePulseStrong 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;\n}\n\n.stat-item.user.filtering .dive-indicator .dive-text {\n    display: inline;\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 轻微 */\n@keyframes divePulse {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0);\n        opacity: 0.6;\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(1px);\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n}\n\n/* 脉冲动画 - 明显（过滤模式） */\n@keyframes divePulseStrong {\n    0%, 100% {\n        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);\n    }\n    50% {\n        transform: translateY(2px) scale(1.15);\n    }\n}\n\n.node-meta {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.node-time {\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n}\n\n.node-count-badge {\n    background: var(--timeline-border);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n}\n\n.node-sub-items {\n    margin-top: 0.25rem;\n    padding-left: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.node-sub-item {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    padding: 0.08rem 0;\n}\n\n/* AI 节点统计样式 */\n.node-stats-container {\n    flex: 1;\n    min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.node-stats-row {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.35rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    line-height: 1;\n    display: inline-flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    height: 1.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-stat-badge.msg { background: rgba(67, 233, 123, 0.25); }\n.node-stat-badge.thinking { \n    background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.25); \n    /* 覆盖 base.html 中全局 .thinking 的样式 */\n    font-style: normal;\n    color: var(--timeline-text);\n    margin-top: 0;\n}\n.node-stat-badge.tool { background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.25); }\n\n.node-duration {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin-right: 0.2rem;\n}\n\n.node-tools-detail {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n    gap: 0.2rem;\n    margin-top: 0.3rem;\n    padding-left: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.tool-tag {\n    font-size: 0.55rem;\n    padding: 0.08rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    background: rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.15);\n    color: var(--timeline-text-muted);\n    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 159, 67, 0.3);\n}\n\n.tool-tag.more {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\n    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n}\n\n/* ========== 右侧详情面板 ========== */\n.detail-panel {\n    flex: 1;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0;\n    box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    opacity: 0;\n    width: 0;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.main-layout.has-selection .detail-panel {\n    opacity: 1;\n    width: auto;\n    flex: 1;\n}\n\n.detail-header {\n    padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);\n    color: #fff;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.detail-header-top {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.detail-header-left {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.6rem;\n}\n\n.detail-type-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }\n\n.detail-info h3 {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 0.9rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.detail-meta {\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    opacity: 0.85;\n    margin-top: 0.05rem;\n}\n\n.detail-header-right {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.expand-mode-toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 15px;\n}\n\n.mode-btn {\n    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;\n    border: none;\n    background: transparent;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    font-size: 0.65rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.mode-btn.active {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    border: none;\n    color: #fff;\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n}\n\n.expand-all-btn:hover {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);\n}\n\n.detail-summary {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n    margin-top: 0.4rem;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.summary-badge {\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.detail-body {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow-y: auto;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 6px;\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n.detail-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--text-muted);\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.sessions-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n/* ========== 卡片样式 ========== */\n.item-card {\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card:hover {\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);\n}\n\n.item-card-header {\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    cursor: pointer;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-header:hover {\n    background: var(--border-color);\n}\n\n.item-card-icon {\n    width: 26px;\n    height: 26px;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.item-card-icon.message { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.thinking { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); }\n.item-card-icon.tool-result { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fa709a 0%, #fee140 100%); }\n\n.item-card-title { flex: 1; }\n.item-card-title .title-main { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-primary); }\n.item-card-title .title-sub { font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n\n.item-card-toggle {\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    transition: transform 0.3s;\n}\n\n.item-card-header.collapsed .item-card-toggle {\n    transform: rotate(-90deg);\n}\n\n.item-card-body {\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n}\n\n.item-card-body.collapsed {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.hover-expand .item-card-body { display: none; }\n.hover-expand .item-card:hover .item-card-body { display: block; }\n.hover-expand .item-card-toggle { display: none; }\n\n.content-text {\n    line-height: 1.6;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.tool-code {\n    background: #1e1e1e;\n    color: #d4d4d4;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-family: 'Consolas', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    max-height: 250px;\n    overflow: auto;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n}\n\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 5px;\n    height: 5px;\n}\n.tool-code::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #555;\n    border-radius: 3px;\n}\n\n.empty-state {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    height: 100%;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.empty-state i {\n    font-size: 2rem;\n    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n    opacity: 0.5;\n}\n\n/* ========== Cline/Kilo/BlackboxAI 环境详情样式 ========== */\n.item-card-icon.env {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%);\n}\n\n.env-details {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n}\n\n.env-section {\n    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    border-left: 3px solid #38ef7d;\n}\n\n.env-section:last-child {\n    margin-bottom: 0;\n}\n\n.env-section-title {\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    color: #38ef7d;\n    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n}\n\n.env-section-content {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.env-raw {\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    white-space: pre-wrap;\n    word-break: break-word;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    padding: 0.5rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* 工具结果卡片图标 */\n.item-card-icon.tool-result {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%);\n}\n\n/* Cline 风格用户消息中的工具结果标记 */\n.timeline-node.user-node .node-preview .tool-result-badge {\n    display: inline-block;\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.2);\n    color: #f093fb;\n    font-size: 0.6rem;\n    padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    margin-right: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n/* 时间线中的工具结果节点样式 */\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.08);\n    border-left-color: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.4);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node:hover {\n    background: rgba(240, 147, 251, 0.15);\n}\n\n.timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #c77dff;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .timeline-node.user-node.tool-result-node .node-preview {\n    color: #e0aaff;\n}\n\n/* ========== 分页 ========== */\n.pagination-footer {\n    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    gap: 0.25rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn {\n    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    color: var(--text-primary);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n}\n\n.pagination-footer .page-btn.active {\n    background: #667eea;\n    color: #fff;\n    border-color: #667eea;\n}\n\n/* ========== 视图模式切换 ========== */\n.view-mode-toggle {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);\n    padding: 0.2rem;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    gap: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn {\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;\n    border: none;\n    background: transparent;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn:hover {\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\n}\n\n.view-mode-btn.active {\n    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n/* ========== Raw Mode 样式 ========== */\n.raw-mode-container {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 100%;\n    max-height: calc(100vh - 280px);\n    background: var(--bg-card);\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-header {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-label {\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-label i {\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n.raw-copy-btn {\n    background: transparent;\n    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);\n    color: var(--text-secondary);\n    padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 0.7rem;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0.3rem;\n}\n\n.raw-copy-btn:hover {\n    background: var(--bg-secondary);\n    border-color: #667eea;\n    color: #667eea;\n}\n\n.raw-copy-btn.copied {\n    background: #28a745;\n    border-color: #28a745;\n    color: #fff;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-content {\n    flex: 1;\n    overflow: auto;\n    padding: 0;\n}\n\n.raw-json {\n    margin: 0;\n    padding: 0.75rem;\n    background: #1e1e1e;\n    color: #d4d4d4;\n    font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', 'Courier New', monospace;\n    font-size: 0.72rem;\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    white-space: pre;\n    overflow-x: auto;\n    min-height: 100%;\n}\n\n.raw-json code {\n    font-family: inherit;\n    color: inherit;\n}\n\n/* Dark mode adjustments for raw mode */\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .raw-json {\n    background: #0d1117;\n    color: #c9d1d9;\n}\n\n[data-theme=\"dark\"] .raw-mode-label i {\n    color: #8b5cf6;\n}\n\n/* Custom scrollbar for raw mode */\n.raw-mode-content::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    height: 8px;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: #2d2d2d;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background: #555;\n    border-radius: 4px;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\n    background: #666;\n}\n\n.raw-mode-content::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {\n    background: #2d2d2d;\n}\n\n/* Summary badge for raw mode */\n.summary-badge.raw {\n    background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* ========== 响应式 ========== */\n@media (max-width: 1200px) {\n    .main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n        width: 220px;\n        min-width: 220px;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n        width: 260px;\n        min-width: 260px;\n    }\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 992px) {\n    .main-layout {\n        flex-direction: column;\n        height: auto;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .sessions-panel {\n        width: 100%;\n        max-width: 100%;\n        max-height: 200px;\n        border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .timeline-panel {\n        width: 100%;\n        min-width: auto;\n        max-height: 250px;\n    }\n    .main-layout.has-selection .detail-panel {\n        border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px;\n        min-height: 400px;\n    }\n}\n\n"

构建成功！我已经完成了 **Workspace 筛选器（方案5）** 的实现。

## 实现内容

### 后端修改

1. **新增 API `GET /api/chat/workspaces`**
   - 返回用户所有的 workspace 列表
   - 包含每个 workspace 的名称、路径和会话数量
   - 按会话数量降序排列

2. **修改 `GET /api/chat/sessions`**
   - 新增 `workspace` 查询参数
   - 支持按 workspace 名称筛选
   - 特殊值 `__none__` 用于筛选没有 workspace 信息的会话

### 前端修改

1. **Workspace 筛选器 UI**（搜索框下方）
   - 点击展开下拉列表
   - 显示所有 workspace 及其会话数量
   - 支持 "All Workspaces"、各个 workspace、"No Workspace" 选项
   - 选中后自动刷新会话列表
   - 有清除按钮

2. **时间线 Header 显示 Workspace**
   - 选中会话后，在时间范围旁边显示 workspace 名称
   - 鼠标悬停显示完整路径

### 文件修改清单

| 文件 | 修改内容 |
|------|---------|
| `controllers/chat.go` | 新增 `GetWorkspaces`，修改 `GetChatSessions` 支持 workspace 筛选 |
| `routes/routes.go` | 添加 `/chat/workspaces` 路由 |
| `templates/dashboard.html` | 添加 workspace 筛选器 HTML 和 JavaScript |
| `static/js/modules/sessions.js` | 添加 workspace 参数到会话加载 |
| `static/js/modules/timeline.js` | 时间线 header 显示 workspace |
| `static/css/dashboard.css` | 添加筛选器和时间线 workspace 样式 |

## 界面效果

```
┌─ Sessions ─────────────────────────┐
│ 🔍 Search all messages...          │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ 📁 All Workspaces        ▼   │   │  ← 点击展开
│ └──────────────────────────────┘   │
│   ┌────────────────────────────┐   │
│   │ Filter by Workspace        │   │  ← 下拉列表
│   │ 🌐 All Workspaces      42  │   │
│   │ 📁 llm_chat_history    15  │   │
│   │ 📁 my_project          12  │   │
│   │ ❓ No Workspace         8  │   │
│   └────────────────────────────┘   │
├────────────────────────────────────┤
│   会话列表...                       │
```

时间线 header：
```
≡ Timeline                       18s
21:58 → 21:58  📁 llm_chat_history   ← workspace 标签
```

重启后端服务即可使用新功能：

```bash
.\llm-chat-history-backend.exe
```

{
  "contents": "package jobs\r\n\r\nimport (\r\n\t\"fmt\"\r\n\t\"llm-chat-history-backend/config\"\r\n\t\"llm-chat-history-backend/database\"\r\n\t\"llm-chat-history-backend/utils\"\r\n\t\"log\"\r\n\t\"time\"\r\n)\r\n\r\n// getAdminEmail 获取管理员邮箱\r\nfunc getAdminEmail() string {\r\n\treturn config.AdminEmail\r\n}\r\n\r\n// StartReportJob 启动定时报告任务\r\nfunc StartReportJob() {\r\n\tcfg := config.Load()\r\n\r\n\t// 确定环境名称\r\n\tenv := \"DEV\"\r\n\tif cfg.Server.Mode == \"release\" {\r\n\t\tenv = \"PROD\"\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Starting report job for %s environment, interval: 1 hour (7:00-23:00 Beijing time)\", env)\r\n\r\n\t// 如果当前在允许时间范围内，立即发送一次报告\r\n\tif isWithinReportingHours() {\r\n\t\tgo sendReport(env)\r\n\t} else {\r\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Current time is outside reporting hours (7:00-23:00), skipping initial report\")\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 每1小时检查一次\r\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(1 * time.Hour)\r\n\tgo func() {\r\n\t\tfor range ticker.C {\r\n\t\t\tif isWithinReportingHours() {\r\n\t\t\t\tsendReport(env)\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Current time is outside reporting hours (7:00-23:00), skipping report\")\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}()\r\n}\r\n\r\n// isWithinReportingHours 检查当前北京时间是否在报告发送时间范围内（7:00-23:00）\r\nfunc isWithinReportingHours() bool {\r\n\tloc, _ := time.LoadLocation(\"Asia/Shanghai\")\r\n\tbeijingTime := time.Now().In(loc)\r\n\thour := beijingTime.Hour()\r\n\t// 早上7点到晚上11点（23点）之间\r\n\treturn hour >= 7 && hour < 23\r\n}\r\n\r\n// sendReport 发送报告\r\nfunc sendReport(env string) {\r\n\tadminEmail := getAdminEmail()\r\n\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Generating report for %s environment...\", env)\r\n\r\n\tdata, err := collectReportData(env)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Failed to collect report data: %v\", err)\r\n\t\treturn\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\terr = utils.SendReportEmail(adminEmail, data)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Failed to send report email: %v\", err)\r\n\t\treturn\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Report sent successfully to %s\", adminEmail)\r\n}\r\n\r\n// collectReportData 收集报告数据\r\nfunc collectReportData(env string) (*utils.ReportData, error) {\r\n\t// 使用北京时间\r\n\tloc, _ := time.LoadLocation(\"Asia/Shanghai\")\r\n\tbeijingTime := time.Now().In(loc)\r\n\r\n\tdata := &utils.ReportData{\r\n\t\tEnvironment: env,\r\n\t\tReportTime:  beijingTime,\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 总注册人数\r\n\terr := database.DB.QueryRow(`SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users`).Scan(&data.TotalUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get total users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日注册人数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM users \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日活跃用户数（当日有遥测事件的用户）\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE user_id IS NOT NULL \r\n\t\tAND DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayActiveUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today active users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 总聊天会话数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions`).Scan(&data.TotalSessions)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get total sessions: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日聊天会话数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodaySessions)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today sessions: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日事件总数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayTotalEvents)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today total events: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日各事件类型统计\r\n\trows, err := database.DB.Query(`\r\n\t\tSELECT event_name, COUNT(*) as count \r\n\t\tFROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t\tGROUP BY event_name \r\n\t\tORDER BY count DESC\r\n\t`)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today events by type: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\tdefer rows.Close()\r\n\r\n\tdata.TodayEvents = make([]utils.EventCount, 0)\r\n\tfor rows.Next() {\r\n\t\tvar ec utils.EventCount\r\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&ec.EventName, &ec.Count); err != nil {\r\n\t\t\tcontinue\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tdata.TodayEvents = append(data.TodayEvents, ec)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn data, nil\r\n}\r\n",

> 我看到在 `StartReportJob` 函数中，根据 `cfg.Server.Mode` 来决定环境名称（DEV 或 PROD）。我需要添加一个开关来控制是否在测试环境发送报告邮件。
>
> 最简单的方法是在 DEV 环境下直接跳过报告任务。让我修改这个文件。

  "new_string": "// StartReportJob 启动定时报告任务\nfunc StartReportJob() {\n\tcfg := config.Load()\n\n\t// 确定环境名称\n\tenv := \"DEV\"\n\tif cfg.Server.Mode == \"release\" {\n\t\tenv = \"PROD\"\n\t}\n\n\t// 测试环境（非 release 模式）不发送报告邮件\n\tif cfg.Server.Mode != \"release\" {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Report job disabled in %s environment (non-release mode)\", env)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Starting report job for %s environment, interval: 1 hour (7:00-23:00 Beijing time)\", env)\n\n\t// 如果当前在允许时间范围内，立即发送一次报告\n\tif isWithinReportingHours() {\n\t\tgo sendReport(env)\n\t} else {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Current time is outside reporting hours (7:00-23:00), skipping initial report\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 每1小时检查一次\n\tticker := time.NewTicker(1 * time.Hour)\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tfor range ticker.C {\n\t\t\tif isWithinReportingHours() {\n\t\t\t\tsendReport(env)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Current time is outside reporting hours (7:00-23:00), skipping report\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n}"
}

to collect report data: %v\", err)\r\n\t\treturn\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\terr = utils.SendReportEmail(adminEmail, data)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Failed to send report email: %v\", err)\r\n\t\treturn\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tlog.Printf(\"[ReportJob] Report sent successfully to %s\", adminEmail)\r\n}\r\n\r\n// collectReportData 收集报告数据\r\nfunc collectReportData(env string) (*utils.ReportData, error) {\r\n\t// 使用北京时间\r\n\tloc, _ := time.LoadLocation(\"Asia/Shanghai\")\r\n\tbeijingTime := time.Now().In(loc)\r\n\r\n\tdata := &utils.ReportData{\r\n\t\tEnvironment: env,\r\n\t\tReportTime:  beijingTime,\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 总注册人数\r\n\terr := database.DB.QueryRow(`SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users`).Scan(&data.TotalUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get total users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日注册人数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM users \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日活跃用户数（当日有遥测事件的用户）\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE user_id IS NOT NULL \r\n\t\tAND DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayActiveUsers)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today active users: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 总聊天会话数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions`).Scan(&data.TotalSessions)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get total sessions: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日聊天会话数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_sessions \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodaySessions)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today sessions: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日事件总数\r\n\terr = database.DB.QueryRow(`\r\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) FROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t`).Scan(&data.TodayTotalEvents)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today total events: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 当日各事件类型统计\r\n\trows, err := database.DB.Query(`\r\n\t\tSELECT event_name, COUNT(*) as count \r\n\t\tFROM telemetry_events \r\n\t\tWHERE DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai') = DATE(NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')\r\n\t\tGROUP BY event_name \r\n\t\tORDER BY count DESC\r\n\t`)\r\n\tif err != nil {\r\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get today events by type: %v\", err)\r\n\t}\r\n\tdefer rows.Close()\r\n\r\n\tdata.TodayEvents = make([]utils.EventCount, 0)\r\n\tfor rows.Next() {\r\n\t\tvar ec utils.EventCount\r\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&ec.EventName, &ec.Count); err != nil {\r\n\t\t\tcontinue\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tdata.TodayEvents = append(data.TodayEvents, ec)\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn data, nil\r\n}\r\n"
}
```

</details>
</details>

```go
// 测试环境（非 release 模式）不发送报告邮件
if cfg.Server.Mode != "release" {
    log.Printf("[ReportJob] Report job disabled in %s environment (non-release mode)", env)
    return
}
```

现在 **只有生产环境**（`cfg.Server.Mode == "release"`）才会发送报告邮件，测试环境会直接跳过并输出日志：

```
[ReportJob] Report job disabled in DEV environment (non-release mode)
```

'zh' : 'en';\n}\n\n// 切换语言\nfunction switchLang(lang) {\n    localStorage.setItem('lang', lang);\n    applyLang(lang);\n    \n    // 更新按钮状态\n    document.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn').forEach(btn => {\n        btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.lang === lang);\n    });\n}\n\n// 应用语言\nfunction applyLang(lang) {\n    const texts = i18n[lang] || i18n.en;\n    \n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {\n        const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');\n        if (texts[key]) {\n            if (el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'BUTTON') {\n                el.innerHTML = texts[key];\n            } else {\n                el.textContent = texts[key];\n            }\n        }\n    });\n}\n\n// 初始化\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    const lang = getPreferredLang();\n    switchLang(lang);\n});\n</script>\n{{end}}\n",
